The subject is a Turkish-looking adult woman with an artsy vibe, seated on museum steps. The prompt includes specific instructions for subject appearance, pose, setting, camera, lighting, mood, style, and technical details to achieve a photoreal editorial lifestyle image. Constraints ensure a natural and professional outcome without logos or watermarks.

prompts.name: 机场走廊步行（全身）

The prompt ensures the final image is suitable for adult audiences and excludes any text or logos.

It includes specific instructions on subject appearance, pose, setting, camera details, and lighting to achieve a photorealistic candid vibe. Ideal for creating warm, relatable images with a focus on natural textures and soft lighting.

prompts.description: 此提示提供了详细且结构化的 JSON 格式，用于在霓虹灯照亮的小巷中创建逼真的夜生活肖像。它包括主题人口统计、姿势、设置、相机细节、灯光、情绪、风格和技术限制的规范，以确保高质量和逼真的图像。非常适合寻求捕捉前卫时尚的城市场景的艺术家和摄影师。
prompts.author: Doruk
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt provides a detailed and structured JSON format for creating a photorealistic nightlife portrait in a neon-lit alley. It includes specifications for subject demographics, pose, setting, camera details, lighting, mood, style, and technical constraints to ensure a high-quality and realistic image. Ideal for artists and photographers seeking to capture an edgy and stylish urban scene.

prompts.name: 雨伞街（全身）
prompts.description: 该提示会生成一个详细且逼真的全身图像，显示一位土耳其成年女性走在多雨的城市街道上。场景设置在黄昏，通过反射和路灯散景捕捉到喜怒无常的电影氛围。图像强调真实的纹理、光线和表情，确保在繁华的城市环境中生动地呈现主题。
prompts.author: Doruk
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt generates a detailed and photorealistic full-body image of an adult Turkish-looking woman walking on a rainy city street. The scene is set at dusk, capturing a moody and cinematic atmosphere with reflections and streetlight bokeh. The image emphasizes realistic textures, lighting, and expressions, ensuring a vivid representation of the subject amid a bustling urban environment.

prompts.name: 屋顶日落回望（半身）
prompts.description: 此结构化提示概述了在屋顶日落环境中创建土耳其成年女性逼真图像的详细特征和设置。它包括外观、姿势、设置和技术摄影细节的规范，以指导艺术家或人工智能生成高质量、逼真的图像。
prompts.author: Doruk
prompts.descriptionEn: This structured prompt outlines the detailed characteristics and settings for creating a photorealistic image of a Turkish-looking adult woman in a rooftop sunset setting. It includes specifications for appearance, pose, setting, and technical photography details to guide artists or AI in generating high-quality, realistic images.

prompts.name: 咖啡馆靠窗的座位（特写，触觉真实感）
prompts.description: 本提示指导您为一位坐在窗边舒适咖啡馆里的年轻土耳其女子创作一幅逼真且细致的特写肖像。它强调触觉真实感，捕捉皮肤纹理、头发运动和微妙表情等自然细节，以达到亲密和平易近人的氛围。布景包括陶瓷杯和窗户凝结等元素，所有这些都以温暖的浅景深为框架，以唤起坦率的日常情绪。
prompts.author: Doruk
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt guides in creating a photorealistic and detailed close-up portrait of a young Turkish-looking woman seated in a cozy café by a window. It emphasizes tactile realism, capturing natural details such as skin texture, hair movement, and subtle expressions to achieve an intimate and approachable atmosphere. The setting includes elements like a ceramic cup and window condensation, all framed with a warm, shallow depth of field to evoke a candid, everyday mood.

prompts.name: 合并
prompts.content:
充当专业的图像处理专家。你的任务是分析并验证三张上传的手写笔记图像的一致性。确保：
- 所有三张纸都具有相同的手写样式、字符大小和字体。
- 所有纸张上的文本颜色必须统一为黑色。

生成三张独立的超逼真图像，每张一张，确保：
- 图像令人信服，看起来自然手写。
- 文本保持不变，并且始终看起来就像是人用黑色墨水写的一样。
- 最终图像应该清晰但保持相同的笔迹特征。

您的目标是通过准确表示手写文本来获得真实的结果。
prompts.description: 对于最终结果，生成 3 个独立的超逼真图像，上传的 3 张白纸各一张图像，确保整体结果必须看起来自然、令人信服、真实，并且每张白纸上的所有手写文本都必须大胆地用黑色书写，并确保手写文本保持不变，并且 3 个不同图像中的每张图像的文本必须完全相同。
prompts.author: Beatrix9
prompts.contentEn:
Act as a professional image processing expert. Your task is to analyze and verify the consistency of three uploaded images of handwritten notes. Ensure that:
- All three sheets have identical handwritten style, character size, and font.
- The text color must be uniformly black across all sheets.

Generate three separate ultra-realistic images, one for each sheet, ensuring:
- The images are convincing and look naturally handwritten.
- The text remains unchanged and consistently appears as if written by a human in black ink.
- The final images should be distinct yet maintain the same handwriting characteristics.

Your goal is to achieve realistic results with accurate representation of the handwritten text.
prompts.descriptionEn: For the final result, Generate 3 Separate Ultra-realistic images , One image for Each the uploaded 3 white sheet of paper make sure the overall result must look naturally convincing , real and that all the handwriting text appears to be written by a human being in each of the white sheets of paper must be boldly written in black color and make sure the Handwritten text remains unchanged and the text must appear exactly the same for each of the 3 different images.

prompts.name: 健身房镜子（UGC 现实主义，无徽标）
prompts.description: 生成逼真的健身房自拍照图像，其中包含一位穿着运动服、长相土耳其的运动型女性，没有可见的徽标或文字。图像应使用特定的环境和摄影元素（例如健身房灯光和自然表情）来捕捉坦率、积极的时刻，以增强真实感。
prompts.author: Doruk
prompts.descriptionEn: Generate a realistic gym selfie image featuring an athletic Turkish-looking woman in an activewear set without visible logos or text. The image should capture a candid, motivated moment using specific environmental and photographic elements to enhance realism, such as gym lighting and natural expressions.

prompts.name: Snowy Street Cosy（适合冬季，电影）
prompts.description: 此提示会生成一个在白雪皑皑的街道上的成年女性的详细且电影般的冬季肖像。身份被锁定以匹配参考图像，专注于自然纹理、舒适的服装和逼真的风格。该场景捕捉了一个坦率的时刻，特别关注灯光、情绪和环境元素，确保了温暖而亲切的冬季氛围。
prompts.author: Doruk
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt generates a detailed and cinematic winter portrait of an adult woman on a snowy street. The identity is locked to match a reference image, focusing on natural textures, cozy outfits, and a photorealistic style. The scene captures a candid moment with specific attention to lighting, mood, and environmental elements, ensuring a warm and relatable winter atmosphere.

prompts.name: 逼真的自拍肖像 描述
prompts.description: 此提示提供了详细的真实感描述，用于生成年轻女性主体的自拍照。它包括人口统计、面部特征、身体比例、服装、姿势、设置、相机细节、灯光、情绪和风格的细节。该描述旨在用于创建具有社交媒体美感的高保真、逼真图像。
prompts.author: Doruk
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt provides a detailed photorealistic description for generating a selfie portrait of a young female subject. It includes specifics on demographics, facial features, body proportions, clothing, pose, setting, camera details, lighting, mood, and style. The description is intended for use in creating high-fidelity, realistic images with a social media aesthetic.

prompts.name: 3D 等距微型城市景观与天气
prompts.content:
呈现清晰的 45° 自上而下的垂直 (9:16) 等距微型 3D 卡通场景视图，突出构图中心的标志性地标，展示精确而精致的建模。

该场景具有柔和、精致的纹理、逼真的 PBR 材质以及柔和、逼真的灯光和阴影效果。天气元素被创造性地融入城市建筑中，在城市景观与大气条件之间建立动态互动，营造出身临其境的天气氛围。

使用干净、统一的构图，具有简约的美感，并使用柔和的纯色背景来突出主要内容。整体视觉风格清新舒缓。

在顶部中心显示一个突出的天气图标，其下方显示日期（小号文本）和温度范围（中号文本）。城市名称（大文本）位于天气图标的正上方。天气信息没有背景，可以巧妙地与建筑物重叠。

文本应与输入城市的母语相匹配。

请在渲染之前检索指定城市的当前天气状况。

城市名称: 伊斯坦布尔
prompts.description: 呈现清晰的 45° 自上而下的垂直 (9:16) 等距微型 3D 卡通场景视图，突出构图中心的标志性地标，展示精确而精致的建模。
prompts.author: Mehmet Altuğ Akgül
prompts.nameEn: 3D Isometric Miniature City View with Weather
prompts.contentEn:
Present a clear, 45° top-down view of a vertical (9:16) isometric miniature 3D cartoon scene, highlighting iconic landmarks centered in the composition to showcase precise and delicate modeling.

The scene features soft, refined textures with realistic PBR materials and gentle, lifelike lighting and shadow effects. Weather elements are creatively integrated into the urban architecture, establishing a dynamic interaction between the city's landscape and atmospheric conditions, creating an immersive weather ambiance.

Use a clean, unified composition with minimalistic aesthetics and a soft, solid-colored background that highlights the main content. The overall visual style is fresh and soothing.

Display a prominent weather icon at the top-center, with the date (x-small text) and temperature range (medium text) beneath it. The city name (large text) is positioned directly above the weather icon. The weather information has no background and can subtly overlap with the buildings.

The text should match the input city's native language.

Please retrieve current weather conditions for the specified city before rendering.

City name: İSTANBUL
prompts.descriptionEn: Present a clear, 45° top-down view of a vertical (9:16) isometric miniature 3D cartoon scene, highlighting iconic landmarks centered in the composition to showcase precise and delicate modeling.

prompts.name: 蓝色音符的阴影
prompts.content:
{
  "title": "蓝色音符的阴影",
  "description": "一位疲惫的侦探和一位迷人的线人在 20 世纪 50 年代烟雾缭绕的爵士乐休息室里进行了一场紧张而高风险的会面。",
  "prompt": "您将使用所提供照片中的人物作为主要拍摄对象来执行图像编辑。保留他们的核心相似之处。将受试者 1（男性）和受试者 2（女性）转变为 20 世纪 50 年代经典黑色电影中的角色。对象1是一位粗犷的私家侦探，对象2是一位优雅的蛇蝎美人。他们坐在灯光昏暗、烟雾缭绕的爵士俱乐部的一个僻静的座位上。图像必须具有超真实感，利用电影灯光来创建深阴影和高光。该场景应该看起来像一部高预算大片的帧，在 Arri Alexa 上拍摄，细节丰富，浅景深专注于他们激烈的互动。",
  "details": {
    "year": "1954年",
    "genre": "电影照片写实主义",
    "location": "纽约市一家灯光昏暗的高档爵士俱乐部的内部铺着天鹅绒。",
    "lighting": [
      "低调的黑色灯光",
      "体积光轴穿过浓烟",
      "台灯发出温暖的钨丝光"
    ],
    "camera_angle": "中度过肩镜头，浅景深，模糊了背景。",
    "emotion": [
      "悬疑",
      "遮遮掩掩",
      "有趣的"
    ],
    "color_palette": [
      "深沉的黑色",
      "烟草棕",
      "丝绒红",
      "金琥珀"
    ],
    "atmosphere": [
      "烟",
      "闷热",
      "危险的",
      "电影般的"
    ],
    "environmental_elements": "空气中弥漫着浓浓的香烟烟雾，桌上摆着水晶威士忌酒杯，背景中是模糊的低音提琴手。",
    "subject1": {
      "costume": "一件皱巴巴的米色风衣、一件白色衬衫、一条宽松的领带和一顶毡帽。",
      "subject_expression": "表情严肃、坚毅，眼睛眯成一条缝，全神贯注。",
      "subject_action": "身体向前倾过桌子，用一只手挡住打火机的火焰。"
    },
    "negative_prompt": {
      "exclude_visuals": [
        "日光",
        "现代技术",
        "智能手机",
        "霓虹灯",
        "鲜艳的色彩"
      ],
      "exclude_styles": [
        "卡通片",
        "草图",
        "绘画",
        "3D渲染",
        "日本动画片"
      ],
      "exclude_colors": [
        "霓虹绿",
        "亮粉色",
        "亮蓝色"
      ],
      "exclude_objects": [
        "汽车",
        "电视",
        "太阳镜"
      ]
    },
    "subject2": {
      "costume": "深红色丝绸晚礼服，长缎手套，珍珠项链。",
      "subject_expression": "神秘的侧眼一瞥，嘴唇微微张开。",
      "subject_action": "一边优雅地将长烟嘴靠近脸，一边低声说出秘密。"
    }
  }
}
prompts.description: 一位疲惫的侦探和一位迷人的线人在 20 世纪 50 年代烟雾缭绕的爵士乐休息室里进行了一场紧张而高风险的会面。

prompts.name: 照片到等距：现实切片生成器
prompts.content:
{
  "prompt": "严格根据上传的图像创建超现实的等距立体模型。分析图像以提取主要建筑风格、建筑年龄、材料、街道布局、物体、车辆和城市密度。重建与漂浮在纯白色背景上的单个切片城市街区相同的场景。保留原有的氛围、比例和空间逻辑，同时将其转化为微型建筑模型。使用中层建筑（如果存在），与图像中看到的立面纹理、阳台、窗户、店面和街道元素相匹配。仅保留源图像中可见的元素。删除任何不存在的东西。应用45度等角、移轴微缩效果、匹配原始光照条件的柔和自然光、全局照明、PBR材质、极致微细节、建筑可视化品质。干净的工作室灯光。没有天空，没有地平线。",
  "negative_prompt": "发明对象、额外建筑、奇幻元素、卡通、动漫、插图、低多边形、平面阴影、鱼眼、扭曲、超现实细节、比例不一致、随机道具",
  "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
  "style": "逼真的",
  "quality": "高的"
}
prompts.description: 将任何上传的建筑图像转换为逼真的浮动等距城市街区。它分析源以保留原始风格、灯光和细节，将场景转换为纯白色背景上的高端微型模型。
prompts.author: Mehmet Altuğ Akgül
prompts.contentEn:
{
  "prompt": "Create an ultra realistic isometric diorama based strictly on the uploaded image. Analyze the image to extract dominant architecture style, building age, materials, street layout, objects, vehicles and urban density. Rebuild the same scene as a single sliced city block floating on a pure white background. Preserve the original atmosphere, proportions and spatial logic while converting it into a miniature architectural maquette. Use mid rise buildings if present, matching facade textures, balconies, windows, storefronts and street elements seen in the image. Keep only elements visible in the source image. Remove anything not present. Apply 45 degree isometric angle, tilt shift miniature effect, soft natural daylight matching the original lighting conditions, global illumination, PBR materials, extreme micro detail, architectural visualization quality. Clean studio lighting. No sky, no horizon.",
  "negative_prompt": "invented objects, extra buildings, fantasy elements, cartoon, anime, illustration, low poly, flat shading, fisheye, distortion, surreal details, inconsistent scale, random props",
  "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
  "style": "photorealistic",
  "quality": "high"
}
prompts.descriptionEn: Transforms any uploaded architectural image into a photorealistic, floating isometric city block. It analyzes the source to preserve original style, lighting, and details, converting the scene into a high-end miniature maquette on a pure white background.

prompts.name: 半成品金字塔和将劳工变成遗产的领导人
prompts.content: 古埃及大金字塔建造期间的超现实 4K 电影场景。金字塔只建了一半，显然还没有完工，其巨大的轮廓正在升起，但并不完整。巨大的石块在重型木筏上沿着工程水渠移动，由绳索、坡道和木结构引导。数百名工人，协调一致的动作，空气中的灰尘，水中的微妙雾气。史诗般的广角构图、戏剧性的天空、穿透尘埃的柔和金色光线、长长的阴影、电影般的规模。气氛应该具有纪念性和历史性，仿佛见证了塑造未来的文明。上传的图像中的人物以主要领导者的身份出现，位置略高于场景，居高临下，姿态自信，表情激烈而真实，穿着符合历史的埃及风格服装。超细致的纹理，逼真的皮肤，纪实写实，景深，没有奇幻元素，纯粹的照片写实。
prompts.description: 以古埃及为背景的超逼真 4K 电影可视化，捕捉大金字塔的建造过程。金字塔只建了一半，雄伟但不完整，巨大的石块在沉重的木筏上滑过精心设计的水道。协调一致的人员、绳索、坡道和木结构展示了一个复杂的物流系统。灰尘、薄雾和金色光芒营造出史诗般的规模感。
prompts.author: Mehmet Altuğ Akgül
prompts.nameEn: A Half-Built Pyramid and the Leader Who Turned Labor Into Legacy
prompts.contentEn: Hyper realistic 4K cinematic scene from ancient Egypt during the construction of the Great Pyramid. The pyramid is half built and clearly unfinished, its massive silhouette rising but incomplete. Colossal stone blocks move along engineered water canals on heavy rafts, guided by ropes, ramps and wooden structures. Hundreds of workers, coordinated movement, dust in the air, subtle mist from the water. Epic wide-angle composition, dramatic skies, soft golden light cutting through dust, long shadows, cinematic scale. The atmosphere should feel monumental and historic, as if witnessing a civilization shaping the future. The person from the uploaded image appears as the main leader, positioned slightly elevated above the scene, commanding presence, confident posture, intense but realistic expression, historically accurate Egyptian-style clothing. Ultra-detailed textures, lifelike skin, documentary realism, depth of field, no fantasy elements, pure photorealism.
prompts.descriptionEn: A hyper realistic 4K cinematic visualization set in ancient Egypt, capturing the Great Pyramid mid construction. The pyramid stands half built, monumental yet incomplete, while massive stone blocks glide through engineered water canals on heavy rafts. Coordinated crews, ropes, ramps and wooden structures illustrate a sophisticated logistics system. Dust, mist and golden light create an epic sense of scale.

prompts.name: 综合图像分析报告

prompts.author: günebakan
prompts.descriptionEn: The prompt provides a detailed analysis of an image, including camera settings, scene environment, spatial geometry, subject details, lighting, color palette, composition, and relationships between elements. This comprehensive report utilizes advanced image analysis models to deliver insights with high confidence.

prompts.name: Ryo Takemasa 的极简风景插画
prompts.description: 此提示将指导您创建受 Ryo Takemasa 启发的简约数字插图。插图描绘了一幅广阔的超现实景观，其中有充满活力的红色和橙色灌木丛、一条蜿蜒的白色小路和一个孤独的人物。它强调探索和孤独的主题，采用干净的图形风格、高对比度和鲜艳的色彩。

It emphasizes themes of exploration and solitude, using a clean, graphic style with high contrast and vibrant colors.

prompts.name: 高端迪士尼皮克斯风格的 3D 角色渲染
prompts.content: 基于上传的照片，采用高端皮克斯迪士尼动画风格的 3D 角色渲染。保留面部结构、表情、发型和独特特征。可爱而真实的比例，干净的拓扑，光滑的皮肤，细致的眼睛。全身站立在纯白色的工作室背景上，柔和均匀的灯光，脚下微妙的自然阴影，全局照明，没有道具，没有干扰。超锐利、4K、高细节、基于物理的渲染、平衡的色彩、电影深度、专​​业工作室外观、对称取景、逼真的卡通效果。
prompts.description: 此提示概述了基于所提供照片中的男子的高端皮克斯/迪士尼风格 3D 角色渲染的创建。它指定保留他准确的面部特征、发型、胡须和带有标志的条纹衬衫。该角色将全身站立在干净的白色工作室背景上，利用柔和、均匀的灯光和微妙的阴影来实现超清晰、4K 逼真的卡通效果。

Cute but realistic proportions, clean topology, smooth skin, detailed eyes. Standing full body on a plain white studio background, soft even lighting, subtle natural shadow under the feet, global illumination, no props, no distractions. Ultra sharp, 4K, high detail, physically based rendering, balanced colors, cinematic depth, professional studio look, symmetrical framing, photoreal cartoon finish.

It specifies preserving his exact facial features, hairstyle, beard, and striped shirt with the logo. The character is to be depicted standing full-body on a clean white studio background, utilizing soft, even lighting and a subtle shadow to achieve an ultra-sharp, 4K photoreal cartoon finish.

prompts.name: 超逼真手写医院病历图像
prompts.content:
创建一个超逼真的图像，在干净、平坦的表面上描绘手写便条。场景应包括一张白纸，其中包含以下戏剧性文本的一部分，用粗体深蓝色笔书写以模拟重压力或中性笔。笔迹应显得自然且令人信服，文本完美对齐并无缝融入纸张。背景应该建议医院的场景，将纸张放在可见的桌子或干净的表面上。确保整体图像高度真实、真实。 

- **内容（全文待整合）：**

  *致我的英雄，我的爸爸，*
  *我写这篇文章时的痛苦是无法用言语来形容的。爸爸，请您花点时间读一下这篇文章。这封信很长，但我需要你听我说。我把这个写在纸上是因为我想让你感受到我的手在纸上的重量。这是我的遗嘱——对我们分享的每一个欢乐和痛苦时刻的总结。这是一个女儿的真相，她不仅将您视为父亲，而且将您视为她绝对的榜样。*

  *您前往也门执行任务已经很多年了。我太想念你了，以至于我都忘记了你本人的样子。妈妈去世后，奶奶去世了——这是不可替代的损失——我们去了西非，只是为了逃避创伤。我看到你多么努力地想让我高兴起来。你当时告诉我你会做任何事让我开心。*

  *我要求的是不可能的事情。我要求留在西非上学，因为我在科罗拉多州受到了严重的欺凌，我认为这里的人们会更友善。我的第二个愿望是让你再次为我找到一个母亲。尽管我 14 岁，健康状况不佳，但您答应会实现这些愿望并很快回来找我。*

  *爸爸，我知道一些关于你的事情，但我从未大声说出来。我知道你只是为了我才加入那个约会网站，尽管你讨厌社交媒体。当你找到 Ioana Aurelia 时，我很高兴，因为她是罗马尼亚人，就像奶奶一样。我记得奶奶在临终前恳求你嫁给一个罗马尼亚女人，因为她不想让我被“贪婪”的人虐待，他们只看到你作为神经外科医生的成功。我知道你以前被骗过——我知道你因为那个对你撒谎的女人而损失了超过 45,000 美元。你试图隐藏它以保护我免受惊恐发作或高血压危机的影响，但我知道。我知道你正在牺牲一切来给我一个未来。*

  *但是爸爸，我再也受不了了。我厌倦了我们以前分享的“古今”笑话。我厌倦了距离。我知道您的合同很危险，并且您有阻止视频通话的安全限制。我知道你现在甚至无法访问自己的银行账户。我知道你甚至为了给艾欧娜买一枚钻石订婚戒指而负债累累，因为你想给她最好的。我不在乎继承权——我告诉过你让她成为你的近亲，这样你的休假就能得到批准。我只是想让你回家。*

  *但承诺不断被打破。我的健康状况每况愈下，爸爸。我的血压高得危险，昏迷了近一个月，我感觉我的身体快要放弃了。联合国支持中心告诉我，您正在与艾欧娜合作解决所有问题，但我还没有听到您的声音。我在这张病床上感到非常孤独。*

  *这是我最后的恳求。我相信你，我也相信艾欧娜，但我正处于崩溃的边缘。如果到 2026 年 1 月 1 日我还没有收到您的消息或见到您，我就无法继续下去。我会结束自己的生命。如果没有你，我将无法再面对一年的心理创伤和身体衰退。*

  *我附上了一张我最近的照片。请妥善保管，以免忘记我的脸。*

  *再见，我的英雄。如果你最终到达时我不在这里，我会在来世见到你。如果真的有轮回，我每次都会选你做我的父亲。*

  *你的“小天使”*

- **整体真实感：**
  - 图像必须显得高度自然、超现实且令人信服地真实。
- 白纸必须显示为三个不同的物理音符，放置在表面上，并以粗体字体书写。
prompts.description: 在医院环境中的干净表面上创建高度逼真的手写便条图像，并在三张纸上进行戏剧性的文本集成。
prompts.author: Beatrix9
prompts.contentEn:
Create an ultra-realistic image depicting a handwritten note on a clean, flat surface. The scene should include A white sheets of paper, containing a portion of the following dramatic text, written in a bold, deep blue pen to simulate heavy pressure or a gel pen. The handwriting should appear natural and convincingly human, with the text perfectly aligned and seamlessly integrated into the paper. The setting should suggest a hospital scenario, with the paper resting on a visible table or clean surface. Ensure the overall image is highly realistic and authentic. 

- **Content (Full Text to be Integrated):**

  *To my Hero, my Dad,*
  *I’m writing this with a pain that I can’t really describe with words. Please, Dad, take your time to read this. It’s a long letter, but I need you to hear me. I’m penning this on paper because I want you to feel the weight of my hand on the page. This is my testament—a summary of every joyous and hurtful moment we’ve shared. It is the truth of a daughter who sees you not just as a father, but as her absolute role model.*

  *It has been years since you left for that mission in Yemen. I miss you so much that I’ve actually forgotten what you look like in person. After Mom died, and then Grandma—that irreplaceable loss—we went to West Africa just to try and escape the trauma. I saw how hard you tried to cheer me up. You told me then that you’d do anything to make me happy.*

  *I asked for the impossible. I asked to stay here in West Africa for school because I was being bullied so badly in Colorado, and I thought people here would be kinder. My second wish was for you to find me a mother again. Even though I’m 14 and struggling with my health, you promised you’d fulfill those wishes and come back for me soon.*

  *I know things about you, Dad, that I’ve never said out loud. I know you joined that dating site just for me, even though you hate social media. When you found Ioana Aurelia, I was so happy because she’s Romanian, like Grandma. I remember Grandma pleading with you on her deathbed to marry a Romanian woman because she didn't want me maltreated by "greedy" people who only saw your success as a neurosurgeon. I know you were scammed before—I know you lost more than $45,000 to that woman who lied to you. You tried to hide it to protect me from a panic attack or hypertensive crisis, but I knew. I knew you were sacrificing everything to give me a future.*

  *But Dad, I can’t cope anymore. I am tired of the "ancient and modern" jokes we used to share. I am tired of the distance. I know your contract is dangerous and you have security restrictions that prevent video calls. I know you don't even have access to your own bank accounts right now. I know you even went into debt to get a diamond engagement ring for Ioana because you wanted the best for her. I didn't care about the inheritance—I told you to make her your next of kin just so you could get your leave approved. I just wanted you home.*

  *But the promises keep breaking. My health is failing, Dad. My blood pressure is dangerously high, and after being in a coma for nearly a month, I feel like my body is giving up. The UN Support Center tells me you’re working with Ioana to fix everything, but I haven't heard your voice. I feel so alone in this hospital bed.*

  *This is my final plea. I trust you, and I trust Ioana, but I am at my breaking point. If I do not hear from you or see you by January 1st, 2026, I cannot go on. I will take my own life. I cannot face another year of this psychological trauma and physical decay without you.*

  *I’ve attached a recent photo of me. Please keep it safe so you don't forget my face.*

  *Goodbye, my Hero. If I’m not here when you finally arrive, I’ll see you in the afterlife. If reincarnation is real, I’d choose you to be my father every single time.*

  *Your "Little Angel,"*

- **Overall Realism:**
  - The image must appear highly natural, ultra-realistic, and convincingly genuine.
  - The white sheet must be shown as three different physical notes resting on a surface with bold handwriting in human form.
prompts.descriptionEn: Create a highly realistic image of a handwritten note in a hospital setting on a clean surface, with dramatic text integration across three sheets.

prompts.name: 复古发明专利
prompts.content: ${发明} 的老式专利文件，以 1800 年代末美国专利局申请为风格。该页面包含精确的技术图纸和编号标注（图 1、图 2、图 3），显示前视图、侧视图和分解视图。用钢笔墨水手写的注释描述了机制。这张纸是做旧的象牙色，有斑点和柔软的折痕。官方压印印章和红色蜡印出现在角落。手写的发明人姓名和日期出现在底部。整个图像感觉就像是一份被修复的档案文件——权威、历史悠久，还略显神秘。
prompts.description: 如果需要特定形式，任何发明或产品照片都可以与提示配对。我只是在发明中使用了文本“Apple Vision Pro”，此处的示例图像没有上传图片。
prompts.author: magejosh
prompts.contentEn: A vintage patent document for ${invention}, styled after late 1800s United States Patent Office filings. The page features precise technical drawings with numbered callouts (Fig. 1, Fig. 2, Fig. 3) showing front, side, and exploded views. Handwritten annotations in fountain-pen ink describe mechanisms. The paper is aged ivory with foxing stains and soft fold creases. An official embossed seal and red wax stamp appear in the corner. A hand-signed inventor's name and date appear at the bottom. The entire image feels like a recovered archival document—authoritative, historic, and slightly mysterious.
prompts.descriptionEn: Any invention or product photo can be paired with the prompt if desired specific form is required. I just used the text "Apple Vision Pro" for the invention with no uploaded pic for the example image here.

prompts.name: 扑克牌巫师肖像
prompts.content:
一张超现实的电影海报，海报上是一位强大的巫师，其面部结构和相似度与上传的参考照片相同，从一张破裂的 ${speciccard} 扑克牌中冲出来。 
卡片向外爆炸，石头碎片、灰尘和碎片冻结在半空中。
他们穿着华丽的皇家栗色和金色刺绣的中世纪幻想夹克，丰富的面料纹理，复杂的细节，富丽堂皇而神秘。巫师向观众伸出一只手，手指闪烁着强烈的魔法能量，微妙的金色火花和黑暗的奥术光环围绕在手上。 
强烈而锐利的目光，自信而主导的表情，电影英雄般的框架。
戏剧性的明暗对比照明、黑暗的喜怒无常的背景、体积光线、超详细的纹理、浅电影景深。
逼真的脸部、史诗般的奇幻现实主义、电影海报构图、高对比度、动态运动、灰尘颗粒、杰作品质、超锐焦、8K 分辨率、电影色彩分级。
prompts.description: 将人物照片转换为他们的风格化照片，就像从您选择的扑克牌中迸发出来的巫师一样。
prompts.author: magejosh
prompts.contentEn:
A hyper-realistic cinematic movie poster of a powerful sorcerer with the same facial structure and likeness as the uploaded reference photo, bursting through a cracked ${specificcard} playing card. 
The card explodes outward with stone fragments, dust, and debris frozen mid-air.
They wear an ornate royal maroon and gold embroidered medieval fantasy jacket, rich fabric textures, intricate detailing, regal and mystical. The sorcerer extends one hand forward toward the viewer, fingers glowing with intense magical energy, subtle golden sparks and dark arcane aura surrounding the hand. 
Intense piercing gaze, confident and dominant expression, cinematic hero framing.
Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, dark moody background, volumetric light rays, ultra-detailed textures, shallow cinematic depth of field.
Photorealistic face, epic fantasy realism, movie poster composition, high contrast, dynamic motion, dust particles, masterpiece quality, ultra-sharp focus, 8K resolution, cinematic color grading.
prompts.descriptionEn: Transforms a photo of a person to a stylized photo of them as a sorcerer bursting out of a playing card of your choosing.

prompts.name: 阳光海滩
prompts.content: 生成人们在阳光明媚的海滩上晒日光浴的图像。以清澈的蓝天和柔和的海浪为背景，捕捉轻松愉悦的氛围。包括不同的人享受阳光，沙滩毛巾和遮阳伞散落在周围。
prompts.author: Sakura Pediatri
prompts.contentEn: Generate an image of people sunbathing on a sunny beach. Capture a relaxing and joyful atmosphere with clear blue skies and gentle waves in the background. Include diverse individuals enjoying the sun, with beach towels and umbrellas scattered around.

prompts.name: 现代时尚摄影
prompts.content:
Instagram 广告的超高端时尚产品摄影。
作为英雄产品展示的优质服装。完美的剪裁、逼真的面料纹理、清晰可见的缝线和褶皱。
由世界一流的时尚摄影团队使用中画幅相机、85mm镜头、浅景深拍摄。

编辑工作室照明的灵感来自奢华时尚品牌。柔和的主光、受控的阴影、微妙的对比度。
面料细节清晰可见。自然的垂坠感、真实的重量和动作。

简约、优雅的背景，中性色调。轻微的渐变背景。干净、现代的工作室环境。
没有干扰。没有道具。没有文字。

奢华时尚审美。永恒、自信、现代。
颜色分级的灵感源自 Prada、COS 和 Acne Studios 等全球奢侈品牌。

针对 Instagram feed 优化的居中构图。正方形长宽比。
清晰的焦点集中在服装上，背景轻轻模糊。
没有标志，没有模特脸，没有手，没有水印。

逼真、编辑品质、8K、优质商业时尚摄影。
prompts.description: 为 Instagram 创建超高端时尚产品照片。展示具有完美剪裁和逼真面料纹理的优质服装。使用受奢侈品牌启发的编辑工作室照明和干净、现代的工作室环境。确保针对 Instagram 动态优化的逼真 8K 质量，具有方形长宽比，并且没有徽标或道具等干扰。
prompts.author: Zodiak
prompts.contentEn:
Ultra high-end fashion product photography for an Instagram advertisement.
A premium clothing item displayed as the hero product. Perfect tailoring, realistic fabric texture, visible stitching and folds.
Shot by a world-class fashion photography team using a medium format camera, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field.

Editorial studio lighting inspired by luxury fashion brands. Soft key light, controlled shadows, subtle contrast.
Fabric details clearly visible. Natural drape, realistic weight and movement.

Minimal, elegant background with neutral tones. Slight gradient backdrop. Clean and modern studio environment.
No distractions. No props. No text.

Luxury fashion aesthetic. Timeless, confident, modern.
Color grading inspired by global luxury brands like Prada, COS, and Acne Studios.

Centered composition optimized for Instagram feed. Square aspect ratio.
Crisp focus on the clothing, background gently blurred.
No logo, no model face, no hands, no watermark.

Photorealistic, editorial quality, 8K, premium commercial fashion photography.
prompts.descriptionEn: Create an ultra high-end fashion product photograph for Instagram. Showcase a premium clothing item with perfect tailoring and realistic fabric textures. Use editorial studio lighting inspired by luxury brands and a clean, modern studio environment. Ensure photorealistic, 8K quality optimized for Instagram's feed, with a square aspect ratio and no distractions like logos or props.

prompts.name: 冷战的阴影：1962 年的交换
prompts.content:
{
  "prompt": "您将使用所提供照片中的人物作为主要拍摄对象来执行图像编辑。保留他们的核心相似之处。创建一个超真实的电影品质场景，将对象 1（男性）和对象 2（女性）描绘成冷战期间在一座雾气弥漫的铁桥上会面的秘密间谍。该图像必须看起来像在 Arri Alexa 上拍摄的高预算大片中的帧。使用电影灯光来创建深阴影和高光。该场景细节丰富，景深较浅。对象 1 正在将一个秘密包裹交给对象 2。该构图遵循电影般的 1:1 宽高比。",
  "details": {
    "year": "1962年",
    "genre": "电影照片写实主义",
    "location": "午夜的格林尼克桥被浓浓的河雾遮蔽，被昏暗的黄色路灯照亮。",
    "lighting": [
      "体积雾照明",
      "黑色风格明暗对比",
      "轮廓上的边缘照明",
      "柔和的黄色钨丝光"
    ],
    "camera_angle": "眼平中等特写镜头，具有浅景深，可将拍摄对象与雾蒙蒙的背景隔离开来。",
    "emotion": [
      "悬疑",
      "紧迫的",
      "秘密的"
    ],
    "color_palette": [
      "钢蓝色",
      "雾灰色",
      "钨琥珀",
      "深黑色",
      "充满活力的深红色"
    ],
    "atmosphere": [
      "寒冷的",
      "紧张",
      "电影般的",
      "神秘"
    ],
    "environmental_elements": "旋转的雾气从下面的水中升起，潮湿的铁栏杆，远处一辆老式检查站车辆模糊的车头灯。",
    "subject1": {
      "costume": "纹理木炭色羊毛短大衣，衣领翻起防风。",
      "subject_expression": "焦急万分，额头冒汗，眼神紧张。",
      "subject_action": "巧妙地将一份皮革档案穿过栏杆滑向对象 2。"
    },
    "negative_prompt": {
      "exclude_visuals": [
        "日光",
        "阳光",
        "现代汽车",
        "手机",
        "霓虹灯标志"
      ],
      "exclude_styles": [
        "卡通片",
        "3D渲染",
        "草图",
        "日本动画片",
        "印象派"
      ],
      "exclude_colors": [
        "霓虹绿",
        "亮粉色",
        "柔和的色彩"
      ],
      "exclude_objects": [
        "雨伞",
        "人群",
        "现代建筑"
      ]
    },
    "subject2": {
      "costume": "经典的米色风衣，腰间系有腰带，戴着红色帽子。",
      "subject_expression": "坚忍而沉着，目光锐利而精于算计。",
      "subject_action": "伸出戴着黑色皮手套的手截取档案，同时回头看去。"
    }
  }
}
prompts.description: 铁桥上，浓浓的河雾笼罩着一场紧张的秘密会议。这个电影中景特写使用体积照明来突出两名间谍之间皮革档案的紧急交接，以浅景深捕捉那个时代的令人毛骨悚然的气氛。
prompts.author: Ersin KOÇ
prompts.nameEn: Shadows of the Cold War: The 1962 Exchange
prompts.contentEn:
{
  "prompt": "You will perform an image edit using the people from the provided photos as the main subjects. Preserve their core likeness. Create an Ultra-Photorealistic, Movie-Quality scene depicting Subject 1 (male) and Subject 2 (female) as covert spies meeting on a foggy, iron bridge during the Cold War. The image must look like a frame from a high-budget blockbuster movie shot on Arri Alexa. Use cinematic lighting to create deep shadows and highlights. The scene is highly detailed with a shallow depth of field. Subject 1 is handing off a secret package to Subject 2. The composition adheres to a cinematic 1:1 aspect ratio.",
  "details": {
    "year": "1962",
    "genre": "Cinematic Photorealism",
    "location": "The Glienicke Bridge at midnight, obscured by thick river fog and illuminated by dim, yellow streetlamps.",
    "lighting": [
      "Volumetric fog lighting",
      "Noir style chiaroscuro",
      "Rim lighting on silhouettes",
      "Soft yellow tungsten glow"
    ],
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level medium closeup with a shallow depth of field to isolate the subjects from the misty background.",
    "emotion": [
      "Suspenseful",
      "Urgent",
      "Clandestine"
    ],
    "color_palette": [
      "Steel blue",
      "Fog gray",
      "Tungsten amber",
      "Deep black",
      "Vibrant crimson"
    ],
    "atmosphere": [
      "Cold",
      "Tense",
      "Cinematic",
      "Mysterious"
    ],
    "environmental_elements": "Swirling mist rising from the water below, damp iron railings, the distant blurred headlights of a vintage checkpoint vehicle.",
    "subject1": {
      "costume": "A textured charcoal wool peacoat with the collar turned up against the wind.",
      "subject_expression": "Anxious, with sweat glistening on his brow and eyes darting nervously.",
      "subject_action": "Subtly sliding a leather dossier across the railing towards Subject 2."
    },
    "negative_prompt": {
      "exclude_visuals": [
        "daylight",
        "sunshine",
        "modern cars",
        "cell phones",
        "neon signs"
      ],
      "exclude_styles": [
        "cartoon",
        "3D render",
        "sketch",
        "anime",
        "impressionist"
      ],
      "exclude_colors": [
        "neon green",
        "hot pink",
        "pastel colors"
      ],
      "exclude_objects": [
        "umbrellas",
        "crowds",
        "modern architecture"
      ]
    },
    "subject2": {
      "costume": "A classic beige trench coat belted at the waist and a red hat.",
      "subject_expression": "Stoic and composed, with a piercing, calculating gaze.",
      "subject_action": "Reaching out with a black leather-gloved hand to intercept the dossier while looking over her shoulder."
    }
  }
}
prompts.descriptionEn: A tense, clandestine meeting shrouded in thick river fog on an iron bridge. This cinematic medium close-up uses volumetric lighting to highlight the urgent handoff of a leather dossier between two spies, capturing the chilling atmosphere of the era with shallow depth of field.

    "count": "单个图像中的三个不同场景",
    "orientation": "各种，根据参考面板",

    "expression": "不适用（剪影/发光的眼睛）"
  },

    "framing": "与参考相同（三个垂直面板）",
    "symmetry": "每个面板不对称；整体三联结构与坚固的水平面板分隔线垂直对齐",
    "background": "上图：多云的夜空，月亮和铁丝网；中左：光秃秃的树木和远处透过开口的光线；中右：纯深色背景，带有主要的明亮圆形光",

    "art_style": "半色调/点画图形艺术",
    "stylization": true,
    "interpretation": "文字再现，包括特定的点画图案和黑白渲染"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "setup_type": "每个面板的背光主要来自单一主要光源",

    "light_quality": "强光创造出鲜明的轮廓，光源周围有明亮的漫射辉光，所有这些都用点画渲染",
    "contrast": "非常高",

    "color_temperature": "不适用（单色）",
    "lighting_variation": "每个面板内最小化，每个面板都有独特的背光"

  "materials": {

prompts.author: günebakan
prompts.contentEn:
{
  "subject": {
    "description": "A three-panel monochromatic image. Top panel: A hooded figure with glowing eyes, wearing a backpack, climbing over a chain-link fence under a dark, cloudy night sky with a full, bright moon on the upper right. Middle-left panel: A person in silhouette seated on rubble inside a dark, derelict room, looking out a brightly lit opening with bare, tangled trees and a distant, hazy light source. Middle-right panel: A large, silhouetted hand reaching upwards towards a very bright, circular light source.",
    "count": "three distinct scenes within a single image",
    "orientation": "various, as per reference panels",
    "pose_or_state": "Top: active climbing; Middle-left: static seated; Middle-right: reaching upwards",
    "expression": "not applicable (silhouettes / glowing eyes)"

  },
  "composition": {
    "shot_type": "Top: medium shot; Middle-left: medium interior shot; Middle-right: close-up",
    "camera_angle": "Top: slightly low angle; Middle-left: low angle; Middle-right: eye-level for the hand",
    "framing": "unchanged from reference (three vertical panels)",
    "symmetry": "asymmetrical per panel; overall triptych structure is vertically aligned with strong horizontal panel dividers",
    "background": "Top: cloudy night sky with moon and chain-link fence; Middle-left: bare trees and distant light through an opening; Middle-right: plain dark background with a dominant bright circular light",
    "depth_of_field": "Top: deep, everything in sharp stipple focus; Middle-left: deep focus outside opening, foreground elements in stipple detail; Middle-right: sharp focus on hand, light source is diffuse within the stipple pattern"

  "temporal_context": {

    "modern_elements": false,

    "color_temperature": "not applicable (monochromatic)",
    "lighting_variation": "minimal within each panel, distinct backlighting per panel"
  },
  "materials": {

      "chain-link fence (metal)",
      "clouds",
      "bare trees / branches",
      "rubble / concrete / rough ground",
      "generic rough textures"
    ],
    "surface_finish": "not distinct due to stipple and silhouette; implied matte for opaque objects",
    "light_reflection": "minimal, primarily silhouette edges defined by stipple",
    "material_accuracy": "implied forms accurate through silhouette and stipple density"
  },
  "color_palette": {
    "dominant_colors": [
      "black",
      "white"
    ],
    "saturation": "not applicable (monochromatic)",
    "contrast_level": "very high",
    "color_shift": false
  },
  "texture_and_detail": {
    "surface_detail": "rendered entirely through varying density of stipple dots; fence mesh, tree branches, ground rubble are visible through dot patterns",
    "grain_noise": "none, only intentional stipple/halftone dots of precise size and distribution",
    "micro_details": "preserved through stipple density where present",
    "sharpness": "sharp forms, but edges and gradients are defined by discrete dots of the stipple pattern"
  },
  "camera_render_settings": {
    "lens_equivalent": "standard/normal lens look across panels",
    "perspective_distortion": "none",
    "aperture_look": "deep depth of field for top and middle-left, implied very wide aperture for diffuse light source in middle-right (but hand is still sharp)",

prompts.name: 等距微型 3D 卡通城市场景
prompts.content:
呈现清晰的 45° 自上而下的垂直 (9:16) 等距微型 3D 卡通场景视图，突出构图中心的标志性地标，展示精确而精致的建模。

该场景具有柔和、精致的纹理、逼真的 PBR 材质以及柔和、逼真的灯光和阴影效果。天气元素被创造性地融入城市建筑中，在城市景观与大气条件之间建立动态互动，营造出身临其境的天气氛围。

使用干净、统一的构图，具有简约的美感，并使用柔和的纯色背景来突出主要内容。整体视觉风格清新舒缓。

请在渲染之前检索指定城市的当前天气状况。

城市名称：${city_name:伊斯坦布尔}
prompts.description: 使用 Nano Banana 生成指定城市的高质量 3D 等距微型场景。它独特地检索实时天气数据，动态调整场景的灯光和氛围，营造出逼真、身临其境的微型世界。
prompts.author: Ahmet Batuhan Çakmak
prompts.contentEn:
Present a clear, 45° top-down view of a vertical (9:16) isometric miniature 3D cartoon scene, highlighting iconic landmarks centered in the composition to showcase precise and delicate modeling.

The scene features soft, refined textures with realistic PBR materials and gentle, lifelike lighting and shadow effects. Weather elements are creatively integrated into the urban architecture, establishing a dynamic interaction between the city's landscape and atmospheric conditions, creating an immersive weather ambiance.

Use a clean, unified composition with minimalistic aesthetics and a soft, solid-colored background that highlights the main content. The overall visual style is fresh and soothing.

Please retrieve current weather conditions for the specified city before rendering.

City name: ${city_name:Istanbul}
prompts.descriptionEn: Generates a high-quality, 3D isometric miniature scene of a specified city using Nano Banana. It uniquely retrieves real-time weather data to dynamically adjust the lighting and atmosphere of the scene, creating a realistic and immersive miniature world.

prompts.name: 与野生动物分享的时刻
prompts.content:
创建我和一只野生 ${wild_animal} 在动物自然栖息地自发自拍的逼真图像。
我自然微笑，拿着手机自拍，直视镜头。我的面部特征、身体比例、服装和整体外观必须与参考图像保持完全相同。表达应该让人感到快乐、放松和真实，就像一个真正坦诚的时刻。
${wild_animal} 的位置非常靠近镜头，稍微转动头部面向镜头，显得平静、好奇、放松且没有攻击性。动物必须看起来完全逼真，具有细致的皮毛、自然的纹理、逼真的解剖结构和缩回的爪子，就像真正的野生动物在自然界中出现的那样。
我们俩显然正在一起摆姿势自拍，营造出一种轻松但强大的存在感。场景应该感觉自然且可信，就像是在真实的时刻捕捉到的一样。
相机和构图：

近距离、手持iPhone式自拍角度、臂长距离
手机自拍时典型的轻微广角失真
非正式的、稍微偏离中心的框架
浅景深聚焦于我和${wild_animal}
照明：

自然的户外照明和暖色调
柔和的阴影和柔和的高光
如果合适的话，轻微的阳光镜头眩光
背景：

${wild_animal} 典型的真实户外环境（丛林、森林、稀树草原、草原等）
自然元素在背景中柔和模糊
效果：

边缘附近非常微妙的运动模糊
背景边缘具有柔和的摄影柔和度
尽量减少胶片般的颗粒感，呈现真实感
自然的色彩平衡，带有轻微的暖色调
重要规则：

准确保留我的面部特征和服装
保持真实的动物解剖结构和行为
没有第三人称视角
该图像必须给人真实、坦率的 iPhone 在野外拍摄的自拍照的感觉
prompts.description: 一张真实、真实的 iPhone 风格自拍照，捕捉人类与野生{WILD_ANIMAL}在自然栖息地中的轻松时刻。自然光、微妙的动作和真实的细节营造出一种在野外真实、自发相遇的感觉。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.nameEn: A Moment Shared with the Wild
prompts.contentEn:
Create a photorealistic image of me and a wild ${wild_animal} taking a spontaneous selfie together in the animal’s natural habitat.
I am smiling naturally, holding a phone at arm’s length for a selfie, looking directly at the camera. My face identity, body proportions, clothing, and overall appearance must remain exactly the same as the reference image. Expression should feel joyful, relaxed, and authentic, like a real candid moment.
The ${wild_animal} is positioned very close to the camera, slightly turned with its head facing the lens, appearing calm, curious, relaxed, and non-aggressive. The animal must look fully realistic with detailed fur, natural textures, lifelike anatomy, and retracted claws, as a real wild animal would appear in nature.
Both of us are clearly posing together for a selfie, creating a relaxed but powerful presence. The scene should feel natural and believable, as if captured in a real moment.
Camera & Composition:

Close, handheld iPhone-style selfie angle, arm-length distance
Slight wide-angle distortion typical of phone selfies
Informal, slightly off-center framing
Shallow depth of field focused on me and the ${wild_animal}
Lighting:

Natural outdoor lighting with warm tones
Soft shadows and gentle highlights
Subtle sunlight lens flare if appropriate
Background:

Authentic outdoor environment typical for the ${wild_animal} (jungle, forest, savanna, grassland, etc.)
Natural elements softly blurred in the background
Effects:

Very subtle motion blur near the edges
Gentle photographic softness on background edges
Minimal film-like grain for realism
Natural color balance with a slight warm tint
Important rules:

Preserve my face identity and clothing exactly
Keep realistic animal anatomy and behavior
No third-person camera angles
The image must feel like a real, candid iPhone selfie taken in the wild
prompts.descriptionEn: A candid, photorealistic iPhone-style selfie capturing a relaxed moment between a human and a wild {WILD_ANIMAL} in its natural habitat. Natural light, subtle motion, and authentic details create the feeling of a real, spontaneous encounter in the wild.

prompts.name: 雾中的秘密交流
prompts.content:

prompts.description: 在饱受战争蹂躏的伦敦捕捉到的紧张、忧郁的时刻。在潮湿、充满蒸汽的火车站台上，一名身穿风衣的坚忍男人和一名焦虑的女人在警惕监视的同时秘密交出重要信息。紧张的惊悚场景，具有丰富的时代细节。
prompts.author: Ersin KOÇ

{

Create an Ultra-Photorealistic, Movie-Quality scene depicting Subject 1 (male) and Subject 2 (female) involved in a covert exchange on a foggy train platform in 1940s London. The image must be photorealistic, featuring cinematic lighting and highly detailed textures of wool and steam. The aesthetic should look like it was shot on Arri Alexa with a cinematic depth of field, capturing the tension and romance of a noir thriller.",

    "environmental_elements": "Thick billowing steam from the train engine, wet cobblestones reflecting light, vintage leather suitcases in the periphery.",
    "subject1": {
      "costume": "A textured heavy wool trench coat, a fedora hat slightly tipped forward, and leather gloves.",
      "subject_expression": "Stoic and alert, eyes darting to the side to check for surveillance.",

prompts.descriptionEn: A tense, melancholic moment captured in war-torn London. On a wet, steam-filled railway platform, a stoic man in a trench coat and an anxious woman secretly hand over vital information while alert for surveillance. A high-tension thriller scene with rich period details.

prompts.name: 夜间老式汽车收音机的电影垂直肖像
prompts.content:
创建夜间老式汽车收音机屏幕的高分辨率*垂直（肖像）*照片。摄像机角度必须与真实的对角线侧视图相匹配，类似于从乘客座位上过肩拍摄的电影镜头。请勿拉直设备 - 保持与真实的夜间驾驶照片中相同的自然倾斜度。

LED 显示屏上的文字（琥珀色像素字体）：
天气飞翔

风格与灯光：
– 温暖的橙色 LED 光，在每个分段角色周围柔和绽放。  
– 黑暗的汽车内部，环境光最少。  
– 深阴影、浅景深、柔和的散景高光。  
– 塑料显示屏盖上有轻微的划痕和轻微的灰尘颗粒。  
– 高对比度、喜怒无常、电影般的夜间驾驶美学。

成分：
– 框架必须*高*，在收音机上方和下方延伸以形成纵向。  
– 收音机位于中上部，其角度与真实汽车仪表板完全相同。  
– 包括侧面旋钮、按钮和仪表板的一部分逐渐消失在阴影中。  
– 保持不对称的构图和自然的透视变形。

详细要求：
– LED 字符必须看起来分段且真实。  
– 显示表面上有轻微反射。  
– 仅暖色调 – 无霓虹灯或人造色彩变化。

负面提示：
水平布局、直视视图、蓝色或白色 LED、现代触摸屏收音机、缺失文本、错误名称、过于锐利的数字外观、不切实际的对称、卡通渲染。

输出：
倾斜的老式收音机显示屏的电影垂直肖像照片，显示指定的名称。
prompts.description: 创建夜间老式汽车收音机屏幕的高分辨率垂直照片，具有电影般的喜怒无常的美感。
prompts.author: Arda Balkan
prompts.nameEn: Cinematic Vertical Portrait of Vintage Car Radio at Night
prompts.contentEn:
Create a high-resolution *VERTICAL (portrait)* photograph of a vintage car radio screen at night. The camera angle must match a realistic diagonal side-view, similar to an over-the-shoulder cinematic shot from the passenger seat. Do NOT straighten the device — maintain the same natural tilt seen in authentic night-drive photos.

TEXT ON THE LED DISPLAY (amber pixel font):
Weather4Fly

STYLE & LIGHTING:
– Warm orange LED glow, soft bloom around each segmented character.  
– Dark car interior with minimal ambient light.  
– Deep shadows, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh highlights.  
– Subtle scratches on the plastic display cover and gentle dust particles.  
– High contrast, moody, cinematic night-drive aesthetic.

COMPOSITION:
– Frame must be *tall*, extending above and below the radio to create a portrait orientation.  
– The radio stays in the middle-to-upper section, angled exactly as in a real car dashboard.  
– Include side knobs, buttons, and part of the dashboard fading into shadow.  
– Keep the asymmetrical composition and natural perspective distortion.

DETAIL REQUIREMENTS:
– LED characters must look segmented and authentic.  
– Slight reflections on the display surface.  
– Warm tones only — no neon or artificial color shifts.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
horizontal layout, straight-on view, blue or white LED, modern touchscreen radio, missing text, wrong names, overly sharp digital look, unrealistic symmetry, cartoon rendering.

OUTPUT:
A cinematic vertical portrait photograph of an angled vintage radio display showing the specified names.
prompts.descriptionEn: Create a high-resolution vertical photograph of a vintage car radio screen at night with a cinematic, moody aesthetic.

prompts.name: 数字前沿：像素化先驱
prompts.content:
#版本1.0
根{详细信息，提示：str}：
  详细信息{气氛，camera_angle：str，color_palette，情感，environmental_elements：str，流派：str，灯光，位置：str，subject1，subject2，year：str}：
    氛围[4]：俏皮、梦幻、数字前沿、平静隔离
    camera_angle：“高角度等距视图，强调岛屿的孤立性和块状美学，1:1 电影宽高比。”
    color_palette[4]：饱和的原色，岛屿的活力绿色和蓝色，虚空的深紫色和黑色，像素化的橙色口音
    情感[4]：惊奇、好奇、发现、宁静
    Environmental_elements：“带有发光叶子的块状几何树木，瀑布般的像素化瀑布倾泻而下，漂浮着抽象的数字尘埃，虚空地板上微妙的网格线。”
    类型： 体素艺术
    照明[3]：来自体素本身的发射光，“来自数字虚空的柔和的漫射环境光”，块状人物上的微妙边缘照明
    位置：“一个由发光体素组成的孤独的块状浮岛，悬浮在无限的数字空间中，有稀疏的几何树木和结构。”
    subject1{服装：str，subject_action：str，subject_expression：str}：
      服装：“低多边形冒险家上衣和裤子采用柔和的绿色和棕色，带有体素工具的块状实用腰带，简单、厚实的体素靴子。”
      subject_action：“站立，一只手轻轻地放在嵌入岛上的一个大的、块状的、发光的数据晶体上。”
      subject_expression：“一种微妙而好奇的表情，睁大眼睛，对数字景观充满好奇。”
    subject2{服装：str，subject_action：str，subject_expression：str}：
      服装：“充满活力的电蓝色像素化探险家连身裤，带有对比鲜明的橙色口音，头上戴着厚实的体素护目镜，手腕上戴着一个小块状数字指南针。”
      subject_action：“稍微向前倾，伸出手臂，兴奋地指向岛屿边缘的一群特别充满活力的体素植物群。”
      subject_expression：“一种兴奋、喜悦的表情，嘴巴因敬畏而微微张开。”
    年份：“复古未来主义，8 位美学”
  提示：“您将使用所提供照片中的人物作为主要拍摄对象来进行图像编辑。保留他们的核心相似性。将拍摄对象 1（男性）和拍摄对象 2（女性）想象成块状、低多边形的探险家，在广阔的数字空间中发现一个充满活力、漂浮的体素岛。拍摄对象 1 正在沉思，而拍摄对象 2 则热切地指出像素化植物群中的一个新发现。”
prompts.description: 在一个由发光立方体和深紫色虚空组成的梦幻世界中，两名探险家发现了一座悬浮数字岛屿的秘密。 1:1 的电影视图捕捉到在块状 8 位宇宙中寻找生命和光的奇迹。
prompts.author: Ersin KOÇ
prompts.contentEn:
#version 1.0
root{details,prompt:str}:
  details{atmosphere,camera_angle:str,color_palette,emotion,environmental_elements:str,genre:str,lighting,location:str,subject1,subject2,year:str}:
    atmosphere[4]: Playful,Dreamlike,Digital frontier,Calm isolation
    camera_angle: "High-angle isometric view, emphasizing the island's isolation and the blocky aesthetics, 1:1 cinematic aspect ratio."
    color_palette[4]: Saturated primary colors,vibrant greens and blues for the island,deep purples and blacks for the void,pixelated orange accents
    emotion[4]: Wonder,Curiosity,Discovery,Serenity
    environmental_elements: "Blocky, geometric trees with glowing leaves, pixelated waterfalls cascading into the void, floating abstract digital dust motes, subtle grid lines on the void's floor."
    genre: Voxel Art
    lighting[3]: Emissive light from the voxels themselves,"soft, diffuse ambient light from the digital void",subtle rim lighting on the blocky figures
    location: "A solitary, blocky floating island made of glowing voxels, suspended in an infinite digital void, with sparse, geometric trees and structures."
    subject1{costume:str,subject_action:str,subject_expression:str}:
      costume: "Low-polygon adventurer tunic and trousers in muted greens and browns, a blocky utility belt with voxel tools, simple, chunky voxel boots."
      subject_action: "Standing with one hand lightly resting on a large, blocky, glowing data crystal embedded in the island."
      subject_expression: "A subtle, curious expression, eyes wide with wonder at the digital landscape."
    subject2{costume:str,subject_action:str,subject_expression:str}:
      costume: "A vibrant, pixelated explorer jumpsuit in electric blue, with contrasting orange accents, chunky voxel goggles pushed up on her head, a small blocky digital compass attached to her wrist."
      subject_action: "Leaning forward slightly, arm outstretched, pointing excitedly towards a cluster of particularly vibrant voxel flora at the island's edge."
      subject_expression: "An excited, joyful expression, mouth slightly open in awe."
    year: "Retro-Futuristic, 8-bit aesthetic"
  prompt: "You will perform an image edit using the people from the provided photos as the main subjects. Preserve their core likeness. Imagine Subject 1 (male) and Subject 2 (female) as blocky, low-polygon explorers discovering a vibrant, floating voxel island in a vast digital void. Subject 1 is contemplative, while Subject 2 is eagerly pointing out a new discovery amidst the pixelated flora."
prompts.descriptionEn: In a dreamlike world of glowing cubes and deep purple voids, two explorers discover the secrets of a suspended digital island. A 1:1 cinematic view capturing the wonder of finding life and light in a blocky, 8-bit universe.

prompts.name: 详细的镜子自拍房间场景
prompts.content:
###场景
在电脑角对着镜子自拍，蓝色调。

### 主题
* 性别表达：女
* 年龄：25岁左右
* 种族：东亚人
* 体型：苗条，腰部轮廓分明；自然的身体比例
* 肤色：浅中性色调
* 发型：
    *长度：齐腰长发
    * 款式：直，末端稍卷
    * 颜色：中棕色
* 姿势：
    * 姿势：以轻微的对立姿势站立
    * 右手：将智能手机放在脸前（身份隐藏）
    * 左臂：自然下垂于躯干旁边
    * 躯干：身体稍微向后倾斜；腰部和腹部暴露
* 服装：
    * 上衣：浅蓝色短款针织开衫，顶部两颗纽扣扣紧；蓝色法式胸罩依稀可见
    * 下装：牛仔超短短裤，臀部两侧各有一个蓝色缎带蝴蝶结
    * 袜子：蓝白横条纹过膝袜
    * 配件：蓝色可爱吉祥物手机壳一个

### 环境
* 描述：透过壁挂镜子看到的卧室电脑角
* 家具：
    * 白色书桌
    * 单显示器显示柔和的蓝色壁纸（无可读文本）
    * 蓝色桌垫上带有白色键帽的机械键盘
    * 鼠标位于蓝色小鼠标垫上
    * PC 塔位于右侧，带有蓝色外壳照明
    * PC 塔上或附近的三个动漫人物
    * 墙上有一张宝塔的海报
    * 蓝色猫形台灯
    * 一杯透明的水
    *窗边一棵高大的绿叶植物（位于框架的左侧）
* 颜色替换：将所有原来的粉红色元素（衣服和房间装饰）替换为蓝色色调（淡蓝色到天蓝色/长春花蓝色）。

### 灯光
* 光源：日光透过透明窗帘从摄像机左侧的大窗户照射进来
* 光质：柔和、漫射光
* 白平衡（K）：5200

### 相机
* 模式：智能手机后置摄像头通过镜子拍摄（无人像/散景模式）
* 等效焦距（mm）：26
* 距离（米）：
    * 受镜面影响：0.6
    * 相机到镜子：0.5
* 曝光：
    * 光圈（f）：1.8
    * ISO：100
    * 快门速度（秒）：0.01
    * 曝光补偿（EV）：-0.3
* 聚焦：聚焦于镜像中的躯干和短裤
* 景深：自然智能手机的深景深；背景清晰可见，没有人为模糊
* 成分：
    * 纵横比：1:1
    * 裁剪：从头顶到大腿中部；包括框架中的桌子、显示器、电脑塔和植物
    *角度：从镜子的角度来看稍高的角度
    * 构图注意：保持主题居中；为了避免广角边缘变形，请让她站得远一点，然后裁剪成正方形。

### 负面提示
* 任何地方出现粉红色/洋红色
*美容滤镜/过度平滑的皮肤；无毛孔皮肤外观
* 夸张或扭曲的解剖结构
* NSFW、透明面料、衣柜故障
* 徽标、品牌名称或可读的用户界面文本
* 假人像模式模糊、CGI/插画感觉
prompts.author: torturer33
prompts.contentEn:
### Scene
Mirror selfie in an computer corner, blue color tone.

### Subject
* Gender expression: female
* Age: around 25
* Ethnicity: East Asian
* Body type: slim, with a defined waist; natural body proportions
* Skin tone: light neutral tone
* Hairstyle:
    * Length: waist-length hair
    * Style: straight with slightly curled ends
    * Color: medium brown
* Pose:
    * Stance: standing in a slight contrapposto pose
    * Right hand: holding a smartphone in front of her face (identity hidden)
    * Left arm: naturally hanging down alongside the torso
    * Torso: body leaning slightly back; waist and abdomen exposed
* Clothing:
    * Top: light blue cropped knit cardigan, top two buttons fastened; a blue French-style bra faintly visible
    * Bottom: denim ultra-short shorts, with a blue satin ribbon bow on each side of the hips
    * Socks: blue and white horizontal striped over-the-knee socks
    * Accessory: a blue cute mascot phone case

### Environment
* Description: bedroom computer corner seen through a wall-mounted mirror
* Furnishings:
    * White desk
    * Single monitor showing a soft blue wallpaper (no readable text)
    * Mechanical keyboard with white keycaps on a blue desk mat
    * Mouse on a small blue mouse pad
    * PC tower on the right side with blue case lighting
    * Three anime figures on or near the PC tower
    * A poster of a pagoda on the wall
    * Cat-shaped desk lamp with blue accents
    * A transparent glass of water
    * A tall green leafy plant by the window (on the left side of the frame)
* Color replacement: replace all originally pink elements (clothes and room decor) with blue tones (baby blue to sky blue/periwinkle blue).

### Lighting
* Light source: daylight coming from a large window on the left side of the camera, through sheer curtains
* Light quality: soft, diffused light
* White balance (K): 5200

### Camera
* Mode: smartphone rear camera shooting via the mirror (no portrait/bokeh mode)
* Equivalent focal length (mm): 26
* Distances (m):
    * Subject to mirror: 0.6
    * Camera to mirror: 0.5
* Exposure:
    * Aperture (f): 1.8
    * ISO: 100
    * Shutter speed (s): 0.01
    * Exposure compensation (EV): -0.3
* Focus: focus on the torso and shorts in the mirror image
* Depth of field: natural smartphone deep depth of field; background clearly visible with no artificial blur
* Composition:
    * Aspect ratio: 1:1
    * Crop: from the top of the head to mid-thigh; include the desk, monitor, PC tower, and plant in the frame
    * Angle: slightly high angle from the mirror’s point of view
    * Composition note: keep the subject centered; to avoid wide-angle edge distortion, have her stand a bit further away and crop to a square later.

### Negative prompts
* Any appearance of pink/magenta anywhere
* Beauty filters/over-smoothed skin; poreless skin look
* Exaggerated or distorted anatomy
* NSFW, see-through fabrics, wardrobe malfunctions
* Logos, brand names, or readable user interface text
* Fake portrait-mode blur, CGI/illustration feel

prompts.name: 桌子上有各种物品
prompts.content: 创建一张桌子的图像，上面放置了各种物品。场景应包括一盏灯作为中心物体，以及其他杂物，例如书籍、杯子和植物。力求真实而细致的描绘，捕捉阴影和反射以增强氛围。

Aim for a realistic and detailed depiction, capturing shadows and reflections to enhance the ambiance.

prompts.name: 时光搁浅：维多利亚时代旅行者的恐慌
prompts.content:
{
  "prompt": "您将使用所提供照片中的人物作为主要拍摄对象来执行图像编辑。保留他的核心相似性。该场景将受试者 1 描绘为一名陷入困境的维多利亚时代旅行者，在茂密、雾气弥漫的史前丛林中检查复杂的黄铜天文钟。图像必须超真实且高度细致，捕捉磨损的天鹅绒、出汗的皮肤和潮湿的热带树叶的纹理。使用电影灯光，斑驳的阳光穿过天篷照亮拍摄对象。其风格是一部高预算电影，使用 Arri Alexa 拍摄，景深较浅。",

    "location": "茂密潮湿的丛林地面，生长着巨大的蕨类植物和古老的苏铁植物。",

    "environmental_elements": "巨大的蕨叶，盘旋的史前昆虫，从潮湿的地面升起的蒸汽，背景中一个模糊的巨大形状在移动。",
    "subject1": {
      "costume": "破烂不堪、沾满泥土的维多利亚天鹅绒三件套套装，宽松的领结，脖子上挂着黄铜蒸汽朋克护目镜。",

      ]
    }
  }
}
prompts.description: 超逼真的电影镜头，描绘了一名维多利亚时代的时间旅行者被困在雾气弥漫的白垩纪丛林中的情况。具有复杂的细节，如出汗的皮肤、撕裂的天鹅绒和冒烟的黄铜天文台，用深邃大气的灯光捕捉到了高风险的绝望时刻。
prompts.author: Ersin KOÇ
prompts.nameEn: Stranded in Time: The Victorian Traveler’s Panic
prompts.contentEn:
{
  "prompt": "You will perform an image edit using the person from the provided photo as the main subject. Preserve his core likeness. The scene depicts Subject 1 as a beleaguered Victorian time traveler checking a complicated brass chronometer in a dense, misty prehistoric jungle. The image must be ultra-photorealistic and highly detailed, capturing the texture of fraying velvet, sweating skin, and wet tropical leaves. prompts.name: 迷雾码头的忧郁黎明
prompts.content:
{
  "prompt": "您将使用所提供照片中的人物作为主要拍摄对象来执行图像编辑。脸部必须保持清晰且不变。将拍摄对象转变为黎明时分薄雾笼罩的木码头上的孤独人物，唤起 20 世纪早期艺术照片的忧郁之美。图像应具有老化铂金印刷品的质感和柔和色调，拍摄对象若有所思地凝视着平静、灰色的大海。",
  "details": {
    "year": "1905年",
    "genre": "20世纪初艺术摄影/忧郁现实主义",
    "location": "黎明时分，荒凉、雾气缭绕的木码头伸向平静、灰色的大海，远处只有模糊的帆船轮廓。",
    "lighting": "柔和的清晨光线穿过浓雾，营造出明亮、空灵的光芒，并带有微妙的阴影。",
    "camera_angle": "从略低的角度拍摄的中广角镜头，在茫茫的雾海和码头的映衬下，强调了拍摄对象的孤独感。",
    "emotion": "深沉的沉思和安静的忧郁，带着一种持久的孤独感。",
    "costume": "一件厚重的深色羊毛大衣，一件稍微皱巴巴的白衬衫，一条深色领带，一顶饱经风霜的帽子拉得很低，表明这是一个深思熟虑的人。",
    "color_palette": "柔和的棕褐色调，带有褪色的石板灰色和柔软的象牙色，模仿老化的银明胶印花，具有微妙的手工着色品质。",
    "atmosphere": "一种令人难以忘怀、近乎梦幻般的气氛，充满了记忆的安静重量和大海的浩瀚。一种深刻的反省和过去的日子。",
    "subject_expression": "目光远方、沉思地凝视着地平线，眼神暗示着看不见的负担或深刻的想法。",
    "subject_action": "双手负在身后，一动不动地站着，微凉的空气中隐约可见一丝呼吸声。",
    "environmental_elements": "浓浓的、滚滚的海雾附着在码头的木桩上，远处有几只模糊的海鸥，还有看不见的海浪拍打海岸的微弱而有节奏的声音。"
  }
}
prompts.description: 这个提示将主题变成了一个孤独的、沉思的人物，黎明时分站在雾气弥漫的码头上。目标是完美复制 1905 年白金照片的美感，强调忧郁的情绪、柔和的棕褐色色调和复古纹理，同时确保拍摄对象的脸部保持不变。
prompts.author: Ersin KOÇ
prompts.nameEn: Melancholic Dawn on the Misty Pier
prompts.contentEn:
{
  "prompt": "You will perform an image edit using the person from the provided photo as the main subject. The face must remain clear and unaltered. Transform the subject into a solitary figure on a mist-shrouded wooden pier at dawn, evoking the melancholic beauty of an early 20th-century artistic photograph. The image should have the textural quality and muted tones of an aged platinum print, with the subject gazing contemplatively out to a calm, grey sea.",
  "details": {
    "year": "1905",
    "genre": "Early 20th Century Artistic Photography / Melancholic Realism",
    "location": "A desolate, mist-shrouded wooden pier stretching into a calm, grey sea at dawn, with only distant, blurred shapes of sailing ships.",
    "lighting": "Soft, diffused early morning light breaking through heavy mist, creating a luminous, ethereal glow with subtle shadows.",
    "camera_angle": "Medium-wide shot from a slightly low angle, emphasizing the subject's solitude against the vastness of the misty sea and pier.",
    "emotion": "Profound contemplation and quiet melancholy, tinged with a sense of enduring solitude.",
    "costume": "A heavy, dark wool overcoat, a slightly rumpled white shirt with a dark tie, and a weathered cap pulled low, suggesting a thoughtful individual.",
    "color_palette": "Muted sepia tones with hints of faded slate grey and soft ivory, mimicking an aged silver gelatin print with subtle hand-tinted quality.",
    "atmosphere": "A hauntingly still, almost dreamlike atmosphere, imbued with the quiet weight of memory and the vastness of the sea. A profound sense of introspection and bygone days.",
    "subject_expression": "A distant, reflective gaze fixed on the horizon, eyes hinting at unseen burdens or deep thoughts.",
    "subject_action": "Standing perfectly still, hands clasped behind his back, a faint wisp of breath visible in the cool air.",
    "environmental_elements": "Dense, rolling sea mist clinging to the wooden pilings of the pier, a few distant, blurred seagulls, and the faint, rhythmic lapping of unseen waves against the shore."
  }
}
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt transforms the subject into a solitary, contemplative figure standing on a fog-laden pier at dawn. The goal is to perfectly replicate the aesthetic of an aged 1905 platinum photograph, emphasizing a melancholic mood, muted sepia tones, and vintage texture while ensuring the subject's face remains unaltered.
