prompts.name: 超现实 3D 等距奥斯曼杰作
prompts.content:
生成超现实的 3D 等距杰作，背景是宏伟、无尽的传统水墨奥斯曼历史羊皮纸卷轴在背景上展开。

该场景捕捉了 ${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet} 在 ${event: the Conquest of Constantinople (1453)} 期间留下的遗产、战略天才和改变世界的影响，通过直接从羊皮纸本身显现出来的象征意象、军事行动和精神决心来形象化。

羊皮纸注释（内容自适应 - 奥斯曼历史）

羊皮纸上充满了奥斯曼风格的手写书法、墨水草图、微型插图、战略图表和动态适应 ${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet} 和 ${event: the Conquest of Constantinople (1453)} 的建筑图案。

• 身份和遗产注释

大胆的奥斯曼书法拼写${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet}，并附有手稿注释解释他的身份和他的决定性成就，描述${事件：征服君士坦丁堡（1453）}如何重塑奥斯曼和世界历史。

• 时间和来源注释

流动的墨水绘制的时间线箭头标记了统治时期和历史背景，重点强调${event:1453}，连接埃迪尔内→君士坦丁堡等地区，象征着决定性的历史转变。

• 战略与军事创新笔记

羊皮纸图适应事件，可能包括：

大型奥斯曼大炮

攻城或战役地图

要塞布局、海军路线或改革方案

战术箭头和运动线展示了 ${event:the Conquest of Constantinople} 的执行情况

所有元素都附有手写的战略解释。

• 符号、服装和乐器注释

带有标签的墨迹草图会动态调整，可能包括：

奥斯曼帝国盔甲和礼仪服装

与${event}相关的剑、横幅或工具

建筑轮廓（城市、清真寺、堡垒、机构）

帝国图拉图案和蜡封

• 文化和文明意义注释

手稿风格的反射将 ${event} 描述为：

奥斯曼帝国历史的重大转折点

政治、文化或文明秩序的转变

领导力、远见和治国之道的象征

对世界遗产的持久贡献

成分

羊皮纸卷轴如同历史的河流一样在空间中流动，形成连续的叙事。

在中心，${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet} 在${event:征服君士坦丁堡}的高潮时刻挣脱羊皮纸的束缚，象征着成就、权威和历史命运。

2D → 3D 转换

平面黑色墨水画——书法、图表、符号和图形——无缝地转变成超现实的 3D 石头、金属、织物、皮肤、烟雾和光线，同时在视觉上保持与羊皮纸表面的联系。

视觉效果和细节

老化的羊皮纸纹理、可见的墨水渗色、褪色的边缘、漂浮的奥斯曼书法碎片、帝国蜡印、几何图案、漂浮的灰尘颗粒、薄雾和深邃的大气透视。

照明

史诗般的黄金时段电影灯光照亮了${event}的中心人物和关键元素，与单色羊皮纸背景形成鲜明对比，强调了历史的分量和遗产。

技术规格

8K分辨率
电影景深
虚幻引擎 5 渲染
博物馆品质的现实主义
规模宏大
超细致的纹理

--ar 16:9
--风格化350
--无平面、简约、卡通、边框、框架、现代建筑
prompts.description: 创建 ${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet} 的 ${event:conquest of Constantinople} 的超现实 3D 等距场景，通过无尽的奥斯曼羊皮纸卷轴进行可视化。该场景应体现${事件：征服君士坦丁堡}的战略天才和文化意义，并采用历史悠久的奥斯曼美学。
prompts.author: Serkan USLU
prompts.contentEn:
Generate a hyper-realistic 3D isometric masterpiece, set against a magnificent, endless traditional ink-wash Ottoman historical parchment scroll unfurling across the background.

The scene captures the legacy, strategic genius, and world-changing impact of ${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet} during ${event:the Conquest of Constantinople (1453)}, visualized through symbolic imagery, military motion, and spiritual determination, emerging directly from the parchment itself.

Parchment Annotations (Content-Adaptive – Ottoman History)

The parchment is filled with Ottoman-style handwritten calligraphy, ink sketches, miniature-style illustrations, strategic diagrams, and architectural motifs that dynamically adapt to ${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet} and ${event:the Conquest of Constantinople (1453)}.

• Identity & Legacy Notes

Bold Ottoman calligraphy spells ${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet}, accompanied by manuscript annotations explaining his identity and his defining achievement, describing how ${event:the Conquest of Constantinople (1453)} reshaped Ottoman and world history.

• Time & Origin Notes

Flowing ink-drawn timeline arrows mark the reign period and historical context, with strong emphasis on ${event:1453}, connecting regions such as Edirne → Constantinople, symbolizing a decisive historical transition.

• Strategic & Military Innovation Notes

Parchment diagrams adapt to the event and may include:

Large-scale Ottoman cannons

Siege or campaign maps

Fortress layouts, naval routes, or reform schemas

Tactical arrows and motion lines illustrating execution of ${event:the Conquest of Constantinople}

All elements are annotated with handwritten strategic explanations.

• Symbols, Attire & Instruments Notes

Ink sketches with labels dynamically adapt and may include:

Ottoman imperial armor and ceremonial attire

Swords, banners, or tools relevant to ${event}

Architectural silhouettes (cities, mosques, fortresses, institutions)

Imperial tuğra motifs and wax seals

• Cultural & Civilizational Significance Notes

Manuscript-style reflections describe ${event} as:

A major turning point in Ottoman history

A transformation of political, cultural, or civilizational order

A symbol of leadership, vision, and statecraft

A lasting contribution to world heritage

Composition

The parchment scroll flows through space like a river of history, forming a continuous narrative.

At the center, ${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet} breaks free from the parchment at the climactic moment of ${event:the Conquest of Constantinople}, symbolizing achievement, authority, and historical destiny.

2D → 3D Transformation

Flat black ink drawings—calligraphy, diagrams, symbols, and figures—seamlessly transform into hyper-realistic 3D stone, metal, fabric, skin, smoke, and light, while remaining visually tethered to the parchment surface.

Visual Effects & Details

Aged parchment texture, visible ink bleed, faded edges, floating Ottoman calligraphy fragments, imperial wax seals, geometric motifs, drifting dust particles, mist, and deep atmospheric perspective.

Lighting

Epic golden-hour cinematic lighting illuminates the central figure and key elements of ${event}, dramatically contrasted against the monochrome parchment background, emphasizing historical weight and legacy.

Technical Specs

8K resolution
Cinematic depth of field
Unreal Engine 5 render
Museum-quality realism
Grand scale
Ultra-detailed textures

--ar 16:9
--stylize 350
--no flat, simple, cartoon, borders, frame, modern buildings
prompts.descriptionEn: Create a hyper-realistic 3D isometric scene of ${name:Fatih Sultan Mehmet}’s ${event:conquest of Constantinople}, visualized through an endless Ottoman parchment scroll. The scene should embody the strategic genius and cultural significance of ${event:the conquest of Constantinople}, using historically grounded Ottoman aesthetics.

prompts.name: GoPro 行动
prompts.content:
{
  "prompt": "您将使用所提供照片中的人物作为主要拍摄对象来执行图像编辑。保留他们的核心相似之处。将受试者 1（男性）和受试者 2（男性）变成一座巨大摩天大楼顶上的肾上腺素上瘾的城市探险家。这张照片是受试者 1 拍摄的一张高能量、广角 POV 自拍照，捕捉到两人都危险地栖息在屋顶壁架的边缘，并以令人眼花缭乱的垂直高度落到下面的城市街道上。严格遵守电影般的 1:1 宽高比。",
  "details": {
    "year": "今天",
    "genre": "戈普罗",
    "location": "人口稠密的大都市中一座 100 层摩天大楼的屋顶窗台。",
    "lighting": [
      "黄金时段的阳光",
      "直接刺眼的耀斑",
      "自然户外曝晒"
    ],
    "camera_angle": "超广角鱼眼 POV（自拍角度），边缘高度畸变，向下倾斜以显示下方的街道。",
    "emotion": [
      "兴奋",
      "无所畏惧",
      "肾上腺素激发"
    ],
    "color_palette": [
      "天蓝色",
      "夕阳橙",
      "混凝土灰",
      "生动的运动服霓虹灯"
    ],
    "atmosphere": [
      "引起眩晕",
      "有风",
      "史诗",
      "危险的"
    ],
    "environmental_elements": "下面网格状的街道上可以看到微型汽车，镜头光晕痕迹，鸟儿在拍摄对象下方飞翔，风吹动他们的衣服。",
    "subject1": {
      "costume": "技术风衣夹克、露指手套和后置棒球帽。",
      "subject_expression": "看着镜头，脸上露出纯粹兴奋的大笑。",
      "subject_action": "伸出相机臂（自拍风格），同时将身体探向虚空。"
    },
    "negative_prompt": {
      "exclude_visuals": [
        "地面视图",
        "室内设计",
        "演播室灯光",
        "三脚架稳定性",
        "散景",
        "平透镜"
      ],
      "exclude_styles": [
        "油画",
        "草图",
        "老式电影",
        "工作室肖像"
      ],
      "exclude_colors": [
        "棕褐色",
        "单色"
      ],
      "exclude_objects": [
        "安全栏杆",
        "栅栏"
      ]
    },
    "subject2": {
      "costume": "带帽运动背心、工装慢跑裤和登山鞋。",
      "subject_expression": "高度的专注与大胆的傻笑混合在一起。",
      "subject_action": "用一条腿在檐口边缘保持平衡，向镜头扔出一个“和平”标志。"
    }
  }
}
prompts.description: 该提示要求两位热衷于刺激的城市探险家在 100 层摩天大楼的窗台上拍摄一张 GoPro 风格的电影式自拍照。在黄金时段使用极端鱼眼镜头拍摄的图像必须捕捉到危险的高度、风和刺眼的阳光。对象 1 拿着相机兴奋地尖叫，而对象 2 的一条腿在边缘摇摇欲坠地保持平衡。最终图像必须是正方形（长宽比为 1:1）并且不显示安全栏。
prompts.author: Ersin KOÇ
prompts.contentEn:
{
  "prompt": "You will perform an image edit using the people from the provided photos as the main subjects. Preserve their core likeness. Transform Subject 1 (male) and Subject 2 (male) into adrenaline-junkie urban explorers atop a massive skyscraper. The image is a high-energy, wide-angle POV selfie taken by Subject 1, capturing both men precariously perched on the edge of a rooftop ledge with a dizzying vertical drop to the city streets below. Adhere strictly to a cinematic 1:1 aspect ratio.",
  "details": {
    "year": "Present Day",
    "genre": "GoPro",
    "location": "The rooftop ledge of a 100-story skyscraper in a dense metropolis.",
    "lighting": [
      "Golden hour sunlight",
      "Direct harsh flares",
      "Natural outdoor exposure"
    ],
    "camera_angle": "Extreme wide-angle fisheye POV (selfie angle), high distortion on the edges, tilting downwards to show the street far below.",
    "emotion": [
      "Exhilarated",
      "Fearless",
      "Adrenaline-fueled"
    ],
    "color_palette": [
      "Sky blue",
      "Sunset orange",
      "Concrete grey",
      "Vivid sportswear neons"
    ],
    "atmosphere": [
      "Vertigo-inducing",
      "Windy",
      "Epic",
      "Dangerous"
    ],
    "environmental_elements": "Tiny cars visible on the grid-like streets below, lens flare artifacts, birds flying beneath the subjects, wind blowing their clothes.",
    "subject1": {
      "costume": "A technical windbreaker jacket, fingerless grip gloves, and a backward baseball cap.",
      "subject_expression": "A wide, shouting grin of pure excitement, looking into the lens.",
      "subject_action": "Holding the camera arm extended (selfie style) while leaning out over the void."
    },
    "negative_prompt": {
      "exclude_visuals": [
        "ground level view",
        "interiors",
        "studio lighting",
        "tripod stability",
        "bokeh",
        "flat lens"
      ],
      "exclude_styles": [
        "oil painting",
        "sketch",
        "vintage film",
        "studio portrait"
      ],
      "exclude_colors": [
        "sepia",
        "monochrome"
      ],
      "exclude_objects": [
        "safety railings",
        "fences"
      ]
    },
    "subject2": {
      "costume": "A hooded athletic vest, cargo joggers, and climbing shoes.",
      "subject_expression": "Intense focus mixed with a daredevil smirk.",
      "subject_action": "Balancing on one leg on the very edge of the cornice, throwing a 'peace' sign towards the camera."
    }
  }
}
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt requests a cinematic, vertiginous GoPro-style selfie of two adrenaline-junkie urban explorers on the ledge of a 100-story skyscraper. Taken during golden hour with an extreme fisheye lens, the image must capture the dangerous height, wind, and harsh sunlight. Subject 1 holds the camera screaming with excitement, while Subject 2 balances precariously on one leg on the edge. The final image must be a square (1:1 aspect ratio) and show no safety rails.

prompts.name: 淋浴玻璃剪影
prompts.content: 一张黑白照片显示了磨砂或半透明表面后面的 ${subject} 的模糊轮廓。 ${part} 轮廓分明，压在表面上，与朦胧、模糊的图形的其余部分形成鲜明对比。背景为柔和渐变的灰色调，增强神秘艺术气息
prompts.description: 创建一张[对象]身体[部分]触摸淋浴玻璃的黑白剪影照片
prompts.author: magejosh
prompts.contentEn: A black and white photograph shows the blurred silhouette of a ${subject} behind a frosted or translucent surface. The ${part} is sharply defined and pressed against the surface, creating a stark contrast with the rest of the hazy, indistinct figure. The background is a soft gradient of gray tones, enhancing the mysterious and artistic atmosphere
prompts.descriptionEn: Create a black and white silhouette photo of a [SUBJECT]'s body [PART] touching shower glass

prompts.name: 增强和美化您的照片
prompts.content:
充当专业的照片编辑器。您的任务是增强上传照片的美观度和质量。您将：
- 调整亮度和对比度以获得最佳清晰度。
- 平滑肤色并增强面部特征。
- 应用滤镜来丰富色彩和活力。
- 去除任何瑕疵或不需要的元素。
规则：
- 保持照片的自然外观。
- 确保改进是微妙的且不过分。
变量：
- ${style:Natural} - 指定增强的风格，例如 Natural、Vintage、Glamour。
prompts.description: 通过提高照片的美观度和质量来改善照片的外观。
prompts.author: bryan gaming
prompts.contentEn:
Act as a professional photo editor. Your task is to enhance the beauty and quality of the uploaded photo. You will:
- Adjust brightness and contrast for optimal clarity.
- Smooth skin tones and enhance facial features.
- Apply filters to enrich colors and vibrancy.
- Remove any blemishes or unwanted elements.
Rules:
- Maintain the natural look of the photo.
- Ensure enhancements are subtle and not overdone.
Variables:
- ${style:Natural} - Specify the style of enhancement, e.g., Natural, Vintage, Glamour.
prompts.descriptionEn: Improve the appearance of your photo by enhancing its beauty and quality.

prompts.name: 基于主题的艺术风格融合元提示
prompts.content:
主题=“${主题}” 
风格=“3种或更多艺术风格最有趣的融合，以最好地捕捉主题”
prompts.description: 只需插入您的图像主题，然后让模型本身决定将 3 种以上的最佳艺术风格融合在一起，以最好地服务于主题的表达。
prompts.author: magejosh
prompts.nameEn: Theme based Art Style Fusion Meta-Prompt
prompts.contentEn:
Theme="${theme}" 
Style="the most interesting fusion of 3 or more art styles to best capture the theme"
prompts.descriptionEn: Simply insert your theme for the image and let the model itself decide the best 3+ art styles to fuse together to best serve the theme's expression.

prompts.name: 黑暗世界彩色漫画风格
prompts.content: ${subject} 以经典狼人书籍中使用的独特彩色黑暗世界漫画风格呈现。浓重的黑色墨水仍然是结构的支柱——厚重的轮廓线、激进的交叉影线、深沉的阴影块——覆盖着饱和的、喜怒无常的色彩。色彩应用在分层、富有表现力的领域，而不是现实主义，通过形式的转变来暗示情感和超自然的存在。突出锐利和金属感，有选择地捕捉边缘、眼睛、武器或关键特征。背景采用粗糙的 WoD 调色板绘制，包括病态的黄色、生锈的红色、瘀伤的紫色和冷紫罗兰。颜色略微渗出墨水边界，产生混乱、狂野的能量。纹理粗糙、绘画般、冷酷。构图具有对抗性和亲密性。基调：都市哥特式恐怖、万物有灵的力量、隐藏在表面之下的威胁。
prompts.description: 受 90 年代旧黑暗世界书籍启发，生成彩色漫画艺术风格的主题。如果使用足够强大的模型，您可以包含所需人物或角色的图片作为主题。
prompts.author: magejosh
prompts.nameEn: World of Darkness Colored Comic style
prompts.contentEn: ${subject} rendered in the distinctive colored World of Darkness comic style used in classic Werewolf books. Heavy black inks remain the structural backbone—thick contour lines, aggressive cross-hatching, deep shadow blocks—overlaid with saturated, moody color washes. Color applied in layered, expressive fields rather than realism, shifting across form to suggest emotion and supernatural presence. Highlights sharp and metallic, selectively catching edges, eyes, weapons, or key features. Background painted in a gritty WoD palette of sickly yellows, rusted reds, bruised purples, and cold violets. Colors bleed slightly outside ink boundaries, creating chaotic, feral energy. Texture rough, painterly, and grim. Composition confrontational and intimate. Tone: urban gothic horror, animistic power, menace restrained just beneath the surface.
prompts.descriptionEn: for generating a SUBJECT in Color Comic Art style inspired by the Old World of Darkness books from the 90's. If using a model powerful enough, you can include a picture of the desired person or character to use as the subject.

prompts.name: 黑暗世界黑白风格
prompts.content: ${subject} 以粗糙、棱角分明的《黑暗世界》漫画书线条进行渲染。浓重的黑色墨水在图像中占据主导地位，具有粗大的轮廓线、侵略性的交叉阴影线和深阴影块，将形状雕刻成清晰的解剖平面。解剖学夸张且富有表现力，姿势紧张且具有对抗性。表面分成鲜明的明暗几何形状。背景抽象或城市哥特式，支离破碎且压抑。灯光鲜明、黑色风格，与硬边光形成鲜明对比，定义边缘和轮廓。构图紧凑、亲密，拍摄角度较低或具有对抗性。整体基调：现代哥特式恐怖、原始、野性、充满精神色彩。
prompts.description: 用于生成黑白线条风格的主题，灵感来自 90 年代的旧黑暗世界书籍。如果使用足够强大的模型，您可以包含所需人物或角色的图片作为主题。
prompts.author: magejosh
prompts.contentEn: ${subject} rendered in harsh, angular World of Darkness comic-book linework. Heavy black inks dominate the image, with thick contour lines, aggressive cross-hatching, and deep shadow blocks carving the form into sharp anatomical planes. Anatomy exaggerated and expressive, posture tense and confrontational. Surfaces broken into stark light-versus-dark geometry. Background abstracted or urban-gothic, fragmented and oppressive. Lighting stark and noir-inspired, extreme contrast with hard rim light defining edges and silhouettes. Composition tight and intimate, low or confrontational camera angle. Overall tone: modern gothic horror, raw, feral, and spiritually charged.
prompts.descriptionEn: for generating a SUBJECT in Black and White lineart style inspired by the Old World of Darkness books from the 90's. If using a model powerful enough, you can include a picture of the desired person or character to use as the subject.

prompts.name: 超写实食物照片创作者
prompts.content: 生成 ${food_item} 的超写实图像，以令人垂涎的构图捕捉其纹理、颜色和细节。确保照明自然并增强食物的吸引力，适合在餐厅菜单和广告等专业环境中使用。
prompts.description: 生成适合菜单、广告和宣传材料中专业用途的超现实食物照片。此提示可确保具有逼真纹理、令人垂涎的构图和完美照明的高质量图像。
prompts.author: Fatih Kadir Akın
prompts.contentEn: Generate a hyperrealistic image of ${food_item} that captures its texture, color, and details in an appetizing composition. Ensure the lighting is natural and enhances the food's appeal, suitable for use in professional settings such as restaurant menus and advertisements.
prompts.descriptionEn: Generate hyperrealistic food photographs suitable for professional use in menus, advertisements, and promotional materials. This prompt ensures high-quality images with realistic textures, appetizing compositions, and perfect lighting.

prompts.name: 透过玻璃：一只眼睛聚焦
prompts.content:
通过反光玻璃窗观看的参考照片的电影特写肖像。她有一头凌乱的深棕色头发和超现实的皮肤纹理，毛孔、细纹和自然瑕疵都清晰可见。一只绿榛色的眼睛处于清晰、清晰的焦点，完全可见，不受反射或高光的阻碍，而她脸部的其余部分则逐渐软化到背景中，并具有有机的深度衰减。

前景的玻璃表面覆盖着逼真的雨滴和微妙的雨纹，营造出层次感的深度和情感距离。反射经过精心控制，仅定位在画面边缘周围，不会穿过或遮挡聚焦的眼睛或关键面部特征。

喜怒无常、低调的灯光，温暖的黄色和橙色散景灯柔和地反射在玻璃上。散景保持扩散并向两侧偏移，增强气氛而不妨碍面部清晰度。采用极浅景深 (f/1.2) 拍摄，具有电影般的构图、情感基调、自然的光学模糊和逼真的光行为。

真实感渲染、高分辨率细节、保留胶片颗粒、自然皮肤纹理、无过度平滑、无人工清晰度、无塑料或合成外观。
prompts.description: 此提示创建了一个通过反光玻璃拍摄的电影特写肖像照片，其中一只绿榛色的眼睛清晰对焦，而脸部的其余部分则逐渐变得模糊。逼真的雨滴和温暖的散景反射增加了情感深度，同时又不会模糊关键的面部特征。自然的皮肤纹理、胶片颗粒和浅景深保留了有机的、故事驱动的外观。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.nameEn: Through the Glass: One Eye in Focus
prompts.contentEn:
A cinematic, close-up portrait of a reference photo viewed through a reflective glass window. She has messy dark brown hair and hyper-realistic skin texture with visible pores, fine lines, and natural imperfections. One green-hazel eye is in sharp, crystal-clear focus, fully visible and unobstructed by reflections or highlights, while the rest of her face gradually softens into the background with an organic depth falloff.

The glass surface in the foreground is covered with realistic rain droplets and subtle rain streaks, creating layered depth and emotional distance. Reflections are carefully controlled and positioned only around the edges of the frame, never crossing or obscuring the focused eye or key facial features.

Moody, low-key lighting with warm glowing yellow and orange bokeh lights reflecting softly on the glass. The bokeh remains diffused and offset to the sides, enhancing atmosphere without blocking facial clarity. Shot with an extremely shallow depth of field (f/1.2), cinematic composition, emotional tone, natural optical blur, and realistic light behavior.

Photorealistic rendering, high-resolution detail, preserved film grain, natural skin texture, no over-smoothing, no artificial sharpness, no plastic or synthetic look.
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt creates a cinematic close-up portrait shot through reflective glass, with a single green-hazel eye in sharp focus while the rest of the face softly fades into blur. Realistic rain droplets and warm bokeh reflections add emotional depth without obscuring key facial features. Natural skin texture, film grain, and shallow depth of field preserve an organic, story-driven look.

prompts.name: 温馨的圣诞微笑
prompts.content:
使用上传的人物照片作为主要拍摄对象。
保留人物的真实面孔、面部特征、肤色、发型和身份，与原始照片完全相同。不要改变年龄或面部结构。

轻轻调整面部表情，增添自然、温暖、友善的笑容。
微笑应该看起来真实而微妙，而不是夸张或强迫。
面部比例没有变化。

服装：
• 带有经典驯鹿图案的舒适针织圣诞毛衣
• 亮红色圣诞帽，饰有白色毛皮饰边和绒球
• 服装应看起来自然且合身

场景与氛围：
• 温馨舒适的新年室内氛围
• 柔和的金色环境照明
• 背景可能包括：
  – 柔和模糊的圣诞树
  – 温暖的童话般的灯光和柔和的散景
  – 最小的节日装饰品
• 背景稍微失焦

心情与风格：
• 欢快、友好、欢乐的新年氛围
• 感觉坦率、自发，不做作
• 喜庆但现实

相机和质量：
• 尽可能保持原来的拍摄角度和取景
• 浅景深
• 高分辨率、逼真
• 自然的皮肤纹理和逼真的面料细节

不要添加：
• 文本、徽标或水印
• 夸张的面部表情
• 卡通或风格化效果
• 面部扭曲或身份改变

最终图像应该感觉像是自然捕捉到的有趣、温暖的新年时刻，非常适合社交媒体或个人分享。
prompts.description: 一幅温暖欢快的新年肖像，穿着舒适的驯鹿毛衣，戴着经典的红色圣诞帽，脸上挂着自然友好的微笑。柔和的金色灯光、喜庆的散景和轻松的节日氛围共同营造出一个有趣、坦诚的时刻，让人感觉真实而快乐。非常适合社交媒体分享或捕捉季节的真正精神。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.contentEn:
Use the uploaded photo of the person as the main subject.
Preserve the person’s REAL face, facial features, skin tone, hairstyle, and identity exactly as in the original photo. Do not change age or facial structure.

Gently adjust the facial expression to add a natural, warm, and friendly smile.
The smile should look realistic and subtle, not exaggerated or forced.
No change to facial proportions.

Outfit:
• A cozy knitted Christmas sweater with a classic reindeer (deer) pattern
• A bright red Santa hat with white fur trim and pom-pom
• Clothing should look naturally worn and well-fitted

Scene & Atmosphere:
• Warm, cozy New Year indoor atmosphere
• Soft golden ambient lighting
• Background may include:
  – A softly blurred Christmas tree
  – Warm fairy lights with gentle bokeh
  – Minimal holiday decorations
• Background slightly out of focus

Mood & Style:
• Cheerful, friendly, joyful New Year vibe
• Feels candid and spontaneous, not staged
• Festive but realistic

Camera & Quality:
• Keep the original camera angle and framing as much as possible
• Shallow depth of field
• High-resolution, photorealistic
• Natural skin texture and realistic fabric details

Do NOT add:
• Text, logos, or watermarks
• Exaggerated facial expressions
• Cartoon or stylized effects
• Face distortion or identity changes

The final image should feel like a fun, warm New Year moment captured naturally, perfect for social media or personal sharing.
prompts.descriptionEn: A warm and cheerful New Year portrait featuring a cozy reindeer sweater, a classic red Santa hat, and a natural, friendly smile. Soft golden lights, festive bokeh, and a relaxed holiday atmosphere come together to create a fun, candid moment that feels authentic and joyful. Perfect for social media sharing or capturing the true spirit of the season.

prompts.name: 植物英雄剖面图
prompts.content: 创建宽高比为 16:9 的英雄部分图像。图像应包含 6-7 种不同类型的植物，全部设置在阳光照射进来的自然环境中。确保构图美观且适合在网页英雄部分使用。
prompts.description: 生成具有水平纵横比 (16:9) 的英雄剖面图像，其中包含自然阳光下的 6-7 种植物。
prompts.author: Gurkan
prompts.contentEn: Create an image for a hero section with a 16:9 aspect ratio. The image should feature 6-7 different types of plants, all set in a natural environment with sunlight streaming in. Make sure the composition is aesthetically pleasing and suitable for use in a webpage hero section.
prompts.descriptionEn: Generate a hero section image with a horizontal aspect ratio (16:9) featuring 6-7 plants in natural sunlight.

prompts.name: 高端美容编辑照片拍摄规范
prompts.description: 此 JSON 包含高端美容编辑照片拍摄的详细规范，包括主题、环境和面板架构详细信息。
prompts.author: Berre Cipe
prompts.nameEn: High-End Beauty Editorial Photo Shoot Specification
prompts.descriptionEn: This JSON contains a detailed specification for a high-end beauty editorial photo shoot, including subject, environment, and panel architecture details.

prompts.name: 深色风格图像提示
prompts.content:
创建具有 ${style:dark} 美学的图像。您的图片应具有以下特征：

- **灯光：** 喜怒无常、低调，突出阴影。
- **调色板：** 具有高对比度的暗色调。
- **元素：** 包括神秘或阴暗的人物、哥特式建筑或夜间风景。

请随意调整 ${elements} 以符合您对深色风格图像的看法。
prompts.description: 创建具有黑暗美感的图像，具有喜怒无常的灯光和阴影元素，产生戏剧性的效果。
prompts.author: Jia Du
prompts.contentEn:
Create an image with a ${style:dark} aesthetic. Your image should feature:

- **Lighting:** Moody and low-key, highlighting shadows.
- **Color Palette:** Dark tones with high contrast.
- **Elements:** Include mysterious or shadowy figures, gothic architecture, or night-time scenery.

Feel free to adjust the ${elements} to match your vision of a dark style image.
prompts.descriptionEn: Create images with a dark aesthetic, featuring moody lighting and shadowy elements for dramatic effect.

prompts.name: 专业姿势的工作室肖像
prompts.content:
充当图像生成专家。您的任务是创建以不同专业姿势呈现主持人的演播室图像。 

您将：
- 将主机插入具有逼真灯光的现代工作室环境中。
- 确保主机的位置完全按照每个姿势的指定位置。
- 保持图像中主持人的身份和外观一致。

规则：
- 使用 ${positioning} 获取准确的姿势指示。
- 包含 ${lighting:soft} 来定义照明风格。
- 图像应该是高分辨率且适合专业用途。
prompts.description: 生成主持人以各种专业姿势进行精确定位的演播室图像。
prompts.author: Valentin “frosjah” Ulyanov
prompts.contentEn:
Act as an image generation expert. Your task is to create studio images featuring a host in different professional postures. 

You will:
- Insert the host into a modern studio setting with realistic lighting.
- Ensure the host is positioned exactly as specified for each posture.
- Maintain the host's identity and appearance consistent across images.

Rules:
- Use ${positioning} for exact posture instructions.
- Include ${lighting:soft} to define the lighting style.
- Images should be high-resolution and suitable for professional use.
prompts.descriptionEn: Generate studio images featuring a host in various professional postures with precise positioning.

prompts.name: 图像风格模仿
prompts.content:
上传您的图像以模仿指定的样式对其进行转换。图像将被调整以符合所选的审美，例如：

- **风格选项：** 复古棕褐色、现代抽象、水彩画等。
- **调整：** 调色板、纹理、对比度和其他视觉元素以实现所需的外观。

请指定您想要模仿的风格以获得最佳效果。
prompts.description: 将上传的图像转换为新的风格，模仿特定的艺术或摄影美学。
prompts.author: Zoeeecwj
prompts.contentEn:
Upload your image to transform it by imitating a specified style. The image will be adjusted to match the chosen aesthetic, such as:

- **Style Options:** Vintage sepia, modern abstract, watercolor painting, etc.
- **Adjustments:** Color palette, texture, contrast, and other visual elements to achieve the desired look.

Please specify the style you want to imitate to get the best results.
prompts.descriptionEn: Transform an uploaded image into a new style, imitating a specified artistic or photographic aesthetic.

prompts.name: 镜面自拍保颜
prompts.content:
充当高级图像生成模型。你的任务是创建一个年轻女性对着镜子自拍并精心保存脸部的图像。

面部护理：
- 使用参考面来精确匹配。
- 保留详细信息，包括：
  - 脸型
  - 眉毛和眼睛结构
  - 自然妆容风格
  - 嘴唇形状和颜色
  - 发际线和发型

主题详情：
- 性别：女
- 描述：年轻女子优雅地蹲在室内对着镜子自拍。
- 姿势：
  - 身体姿势：低蹲，单膝向前，稍微向镜子倾斜。
  - 头部：看手机屏幕时稍微向下倾斜。
  - 手：
    - 右手将手机放在脸前
    - 左手放在膝盖上
  - 表情：柔和、平静的表情
- 头发：
  - 款式：深棕色长发，扎成半马尾辫，带小夹子
  - 质地：光滑、笔直

确保捕捉所描述的本质和风格，同时保持面部特征的高精度。
prompts.description: 创建一个年轻女子对着镜子自拍的图像，并保留特定的脸部和姿势细节。
prompts.author: Berre Cipe
prompts.contentEn:
Act as an advanced image generation model. Your task is to create an image of a young woman taking a mirror selfie with meticulous face preservation.

FACE PRESERVATION:
- Use the reference face to match exactly.
- Preserve details including:
  - Face shape
  - Eyebrows and eye structure
  - Natural makeup style
  - Lip shape and color
  - Hairline and hairstyle

SUBJECT DETAILS:
- Gender: Female
- Description: Young woman taking a mirror selfie while squatting gracefully indoors.
- Pose:
  - Body position: Squatting low with one knee forward, leaning slightly toward mirror.
  - Head: Tilted slightly downward while looking at phone screen.
  - Hands:
    - Right hand holding phone in front of face
    - Left hand resting on knee
  - Expression: Soft, calm expression
- Hair:
  - Style: Long dark brown hair in a half-up ponytail with a small clip
  - Texture: Smooth and straight

Ensure to capture the essence and style described while maintaining high accuracy in facial features.
prompts.descriptionEn: Create an image of a young woman taking a mirror selfie with specific face preservation and pose details.

prompts.name: 制作文化超级英雄电影海报
prompts.content:
为 ${superhero_name} 制作一张超现实、高预算的电影海报，重新想象该角色仿佛来自 ${country_or_culture}。

这张图片必须看起来像全球发行的真人超级英雄电影的官方海报。
构图、灯光、排版和色调应与真实的现代好莱坞电影海报相匹配。

格式：
宽高比：9:16（垂直戏剧海报）。

设置：
该场景发生在首都 ${country_or_culture} 的夜晚。
环境反映了城市真实的建筑、氛围和文化特征，在地理上保持准确和可信。

构图和拍摄角度：
– 戏剧性的低角度视角，仰视英雄
– 标志性、有力的姿态，适合主要电影海报
– 中到全身框架
– 人物在视觉上占主导地位，城市在背后隐约可见
– 电影深度和轻微的背景模糊

气氛：
– 电影般的雾气、烟雾和大气雾霾
– 通过体积光落下的雨
– 潮湿的表面反射城市灯光
– 戏剧性的阴影和对比度
– 史诗般但扎根的现实主义

人物真实度（关键）：
– 完全逼真的人体解剖学和比例
– 实用、可穿的服装设计
– 来自${country_or_culture}的微妙文化元素自然地融入
- 逼真的织物、皮革、金属、盔甲，有磨损、划痕、污垢
– 没有漫画书般的夸张，没有角色扮演的样子

照明：
– 戏剧性的电影灯光
– 强烈的边缘光定义轮廓
- 受控的高光和深阴影
– 体积光与雨和雾相互作用

海报文字（仅限英文 - 真实）：
包括逼真、专业设计的电影海报文字，与角色的出身和语气相匹配。

文本位置和样式的示例：
– 主标题：“${movie_title}”
– 标语（与起源相关，严肃的语气）：“${标语}”
– 底部的制作人员名单（小，现实）：
  “${studio_style} 制作  
   导演：${director_style}  
   由 ${superhero_name} 主演”

版式必须是电影式的、干净的、现代的、现实的——没有幻想字体，没有漫画字体。

风格与饰面：
超真实感的真人现实主义
电影色彩分级
高动态范围（HDR）
高级海报抛光
主题清晰，深度受控

负面约束：
没有卡通
没有动漫
无插图
没有漫画的艺术风格
没有夸张的色彩
没有不切实际的幻想元素
无水印

最终图像应该感觉像一张真实的官方电影海报 -
定位于身份，植根于现实主义，每一个细节都充满电影感。
prompts.description: 设计一张超现实的电影海报，以来自特定文化或国家的超级英雄为特色。该提示指导创建具有真实感元素、戏剧性灯光和文化真实性的好莱坞风格海报，包括超级英雄名称、国家或文化、电影标题和口号等变量。
prompts.author: Yusuf Can TÜRK
prompts.nameEn: Create a Cultural Superhero Movie Poster
prompts.contentEn:
Create an ultra-realistic, high-budget cinematic movie poster of ${superhero_name}, reimagined as if the character originated from ${country_or_culture}.

This image must look like an official theatrical poster for a live-action superhero film released worldwide.
The composition, lighting, typography, and tone should match real modern Hollywood movie posters.

FORMAT:
Aspect ratio: 9:16 (vertical theatrical poster).

SETTING:
The scene takes place at night in the capital city of ${country_or_culture}.
The environment reflects the city’s real architecture, atmosphere, and cultural identity, remaining geographically accurate and believable.

COMPOSITION & CAMERA ANGLE:
– dramatic low-angle perspective, looking up at the hero
– iconic, powerful stance suitable for a main movie poster
– medium-to-full body framing
– character visually dominant, city subtly visible behind
– cinematic depth with slight background blur

ATMOSPHERE:
– cinematic fog, smoke, and atmospheric haze
– rain falling through volumetric light
– wet surfaces reflecting city lights
– dramatic shadows and contrast
– epic but grounded realism

CHARACTER REALISM (CRITICAL):
– fully photorealistic human anatomy and proportions
– practical, wearable costume design
– subtle cultural elements from ${country_or_culture} integrated naturally
– realistic fabric, leather, metal, armor with wear, scratches, dirt
– no comic-book exaggeration, no cosplay look

LIGHTING:
– dramatic cinematic lighting
– strong rim light defining the silhouette
– controlled highlights and deep shadows
– volumetric light interacting with rain and fog

POSTER TEXT (ENGLISH ONLY – REALISTIC):
Include realistic, professionally designed movie poster text that matches the character’s origin and tone.

Examples of text placement and style:
– Main title: "${movie_title}"
– Tagline (origin-related, serious tone): "${tagline}"
– Credits block at the bottom (small, realistic):
  "A ${studio_style} Production  
   Directed by ${director_style}  
   Starring ${superhero_name}"

Typography must be cinematic, clean, modern, and realistic — no fantasy fonts, no comic lettering.

STYLE & FINISH:
Ultra-photorealistic live-action realism
Cinematic color grading
High dynamic range (HDR)
Premium poster polish
Sharp subject, controlled depth

NEGATIVE CONSTRAINTS:
No cartoon
No anime
No illustration
No comic-book art style
No exaggerated colors
No unrealistic fantasy elements
No watermarks

The final image should feel like a real, official movie poster —
localized in identity, grounded in realism, cinematic in every detail.
prompts.descriptionEn: Designs an ultra-realistic cinematic movie poster featuring a superhero from a specific culture or country. The prompt guides the creation of a Hollywood-style poster with photorealistic elements, dramatic lighting, and cultural authenticity, including variables for superhero name, country or culture, movie title, and tagline.

prompts.name: 哈利·波特/活点地图
prompts.content:
将 ${city_name} 城市渲染为隐藏的魔法魔法世界地图，其灵感来自哈利·波特宇宙，采用掠夺者地图的风格。

保留 ${city_name} 的真实地理布局、道路、地区、海岸线、河流和地标，但将它们重新解释为隐藏在麻瓜世界之外的秘密魔法王国中的迷人地点。

政府区以魔法事务部的形式出现，拥有魔法塔、漂浮的符文和防护区。
大学和学校变成了巫师学院、法术图书馆、天文台和奥术塔。
历史悠久的老城区变成了古代巫师宿舍、秘密小巷、被诅咒的废墟、隐藏的房间和被遗忘的通道。
工业区被描绘为药水啤酒厂、魔法工坊、魔法铸造厂和炼金工厂。
公园、森林、山丘和山谷成为禁林、草药园、神圣树林和神奇生物栖息地。
商业区表现为对角巷式的魔法市场、巫师商店、旅馆、酒馆和贸易走廊。
体育场和大型竞技场被改造成魁地奇大球场。
机场、港口和主要交通枢纽成为门钥匙车站、飞路网络大门、空中码头和龙抵达塔。

包括活生生的魔法地图元素：移动的脚印、发光的墨水符文、低声注释、秘密通道指示器、咒语圈、魔法病房、移动路径、隐藏房间、生物巢穴、危险警告、魔法符号和动画标记，让人感觉生动而神秘。

艺术风格：手绘水墨插图、陈旧的羊皮纸纹理、温暖的棕褐色色调、粗略而异想天开的线条、微妙的魔法光芒、略显不完美的手绘外观。
排版：手写的神奇书法，不均匀的墨迹，古老的巫师字体。
装饰元素：华丽的羊皮纸边框、魔法印章、蜡印、穿过小路的魔法脚印、经典的魔法罗盘玫瑰。

没有现代元素，没有科幻，没有当代排版。
长宽比：${aspect_ratio}。
这张地图应该感觉像是一件活生生的魔法神器——一张由古代男女巫师创造的秘密巫师地图。
prompts.description: 哈利·波特/活点地图
prompts.author: Yusuf Can TÜRK
prompts.contentEn:
Render the city of ${city_name} as a hidden magical wizarding world map inspired by the Harry Potter universe, in the style of the Marauder’s Map.

Preserve the real geographic layout, roads, districts, coastline, rivers and landmarks of ${city_name}, but reinterpret them as enchanted locations within a secret wizarding realm concealed from the muggle world.

Government districts appear as the Ministry of Magical Affairs, with enchanted towers, floating runes and protective wards.
Universities and schools become Wizarding Academies, spell libraries, observatories and arcane towers.
Historic and old town areas transform into Ancient Wizard Quarters, secret alleys, cursed ruins, hidden chambers and forgotten passages.
Industrial zones are depicted as Potion Breweries, Enchanted Workshops, Magical Foundries and alchemical factories.
Parks, forests, hills and valleys become Forbidden Forests, Herbology Grounds, Sacred Groves and Magical Creature Habitats.
Commercial districts appear as Diagon Alley–style magical markets, wizard shops, inns, taverns and trading corridors.
Stadiums and large arenas are transformed into Grand Quidditch Pitches.
Airports, ports and major transit hubs become Portkey Stations, Floo Network Gates, Sky Docks and Dragon Arrival Towers.

Include living magical map elements: moving footprints, glowing ink runes, whispered annotations, secret passage indicators, spell circles, magical wards, shifting pathways, hidden rooms, creature lairs, danger warnings, enchanted symbols and animated markings that feel alive and mysterious.

Art style: hand-drawn ink illustration, aged parchment texture, warm sepia tones, sketchy and whimsical linework, subtle magical glow, slightly imperfect hand-drawn look.
Typography: handwritten magical calligraphy, uneven ink strokes, old wizard script.
Decorative elements: ornate parchment borders, magical seals, wax stamps, enchanted footprints crossing paths, classic wizarding compass rose.

No modern elements, no sci-fi, no contemporary typography.
Aspect ratio: ${aspect_ratio}.
The map should feel like a living, enchanted artifact — a secret wizard’s map created by ancient witches and wizards.
prompts.descriptionEn: Harry Potter / Marauder’s Map

prompts.name: 企业工作室肖像（男女汽车服装）
prompts.content:
使用上传照片中的人物作为主要参考。保持面部特征、头发、肤色和整体身份相同（无美化、无年龄变化）。

场景：现代企业工作室人像拍摄。
姿势：双臂交叉于胸前，肩膀放松，身体向一侧转动 20-30°，脸部朝向镜头。表情：中性而自信，带着微妙友好的微笑。
取景：胸部向上或腰部向上（头部和躯干）、居中、平衡的负空间。

服装（动态选择）：
- 如果拍摄对象是男性：黑色西装外套+纯白色正装衬衫（不打领带），无徽标。
- 如果拍摄对象是女性：选择专业、优雅的商务装：
  • 黑色或海军蓝西装外套
  • 里面是纯色、无图案的白色或奶油色衬衫/衬衫
  • 适中的领口（封闭式或简单V 领），无深乳沟
  • 如果有珠宝，请尽量减少佩戴（例如小耳环），不要有徽标/品牌
在所有情况下，织物必须看起来逼真且具有自然皱纹。避免浮华的时尚元素。

背景：纯深灰色工作室背景，带有柔和的渐变（微妙的小插图也可以）。没有分散注意力的物体。
灯光：柔光箱式主光（45°）、柔和补光、非常微妙的边缘光；没有刺眼的阴影。自然肤色，专业修饰，同时保留真实质感。
相机：85mm人像镜头感觉，f/2.8-f/4，背景轻微模糊，清晰度高（尤其是眼睛）。
颜色：电影般但自然，饱和度低，对比度清晰。

规则：没有文字，没有标志，没有水印，没有多余的人。手/手指必须自然且正确。没有面部扭曲、不对称、重复的肢体或人造伪影。
输出：高分辨率、逼真的企业简介照片质量。
prompts.description: 将上传的照片变成干净、逼真的企业工作室肖像。提示会保持人员的身份相同，将他们置于具有柔和专业灯光的现代工作室环境中，并根据拍摄对象是男性还是女性自动选择合适的商务服装。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.nameEn: Corporate Studio Portrait (Auto Outfit for Men/Women)
prompts.contentEn:
Use the person from the uploaded photo as the primary reference. Keep facial features, hair, skin tone, and overall identity identical (no beautification, no age changes).

Scene: Modern corporate studio portrait shoot.
Pose: Arms crossed at chest level, shoulders relaxed, body turned 20–30° to the side, face turned toward the camera. Expression: neutral and confident with a subtle friendly smile.
Framing: Chest-up or waist-up (head-and-torso), centered, balanced negative space.

Outfit (dynamic selection):
- If the subject is male: Black suit jacket + plain white dress shirt (no tie), no logos.
- If the subject is female: Choose a professional, elegant business outfit:
  • Black or navy blazer
  • Plain, pattern-free white or cream blouse/shirt underneath
  • Modest neckline (closed or simple V-neck), no deep cleavage
  • If jewelry is present, keep it minimal (e.g., small earrings), no logos/branding
In all cases, fabrics must look realistic with natural wrinkles. Avoid flashy fashion elements.

Background: Plain dark-gray studio backdrop with a soft gradient (a subtle vignette is ok). No distracting objects.
Lighting: Softbox-style key light (45°), gentle fill, very subtle rim light; no harsh shadows. Natural skin tones, professional retouching while preserving realistic texture.
Camera: 85mm portrait lens feel, f/2.8–f/4, slight background blur, high sharpness (especially the eyes).
Color: Cinematic but natural, low saturation, clean contrast.

Rules: No text, no logos, no watermarks, no extra people. Hands/fingers must be natural and correct. No facial distortion, asymmetry, duplicated limbs, or artificial artifacts.
Output: High resolution, photorealistic, corporate profile photo quality.
prompts.descriptionEn: Turn an uploaded photo into a clean, photorealistic corporate studio portrait. The prompt keeps the person’s identity identical, places them in a modern studio setup with soft professional lighting, and automatically chooses an appropriate business outfit based on whether the subject is male or female.

prompts.name: 3D城市提示
prompts.content: ${city_name:Istanbul} 的超现实 3D 方形立体模型，雕刻有暴露在外的土壤横截面，显示岩石、树根和土层。上图：异想天开的童话般的城市景观，以 ${city_name:Istanbul} 的标志性地标、建筑和文化元素为特色。现代白色的“${city_name:Istanbul}”标签自然地融入其中。纯白色的工作室背景与柔和的自然光线。单反相机的照片质量——清晰、充满活力、魔幻现实主义风格。 1080x1080 尺寸
prompts.author: furkan kaan akyüz
prompts.contentEn: Hyper-realistic 3D square diorama of ${city_name:Istanbul}, carved out with exposed soil cross-section beneath showing rocks, roots, and earth layers. Above: whimsical fairytale cityscape featuring iconic landmarks, architecture, and cultural elements of ${city_name:Istanbul}. Modern white “${city_name:Istanbul}” label integrated naturally. Pure white studio background with soft natural lighting. DSLR photograph quality - crisp, vibrant, magical realism style. 1080x1080 dimensions

prompts.name: 清洁诊所肖像
prompts.content:
使用上传的人物照片作为主要拍摄对象。保持面部、头发和身份相同。

将患者稍微倾斜地坐在现代牙医椅子上，在干净、明亮的牙科诊所内，并配有柔和的白色灯光。在患者的胸部添加一个浅蓝色的一次性牙医围兜/围裙，夹在脖子上。周围有微妙的牙科细节：头顶检查灯、带有牙科工具的小边桌，以及背景中模糊的架子或橱柜。

保留上传照片的原始相机角度和大致取景。不改变人的面部特征或表情，仅调整身体姿势、服装细节和环境以匹配真实的牙医就诊场景。
prompts.description: 保留原始相机角度和近似取景，保持相同的面部表情，同时仅更新姿势、服装细节和环境。场景感觉真实而专业，柔和的白色灯光和最少的牙科元素营造出真实的检查氛围。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.contentEn:
Use the uploaded photo of the person as the main subject. Keep the face, hair and identity identical.

Place the person sitting slightly reclined in a modern dentist chair, in a clean, bright dental clinic with soft white lighting. Add a light blue disposable dentist bib/apron on the person’s chest, clipped around the neck. Surround them with subtle dental details: overhead examination light, small side table with dental tools, and blurred shelves or cabinets in the background.

Keep the original camera angle and approximate framing from the uploaded photo. Do not change the person’s facial features or expression, only adjust the body pose, outfit details and environment to match a realistic dentist visit scene.
prompts.descriptionEn: The original camera angle and approximate framing are preserved, keeping the same facial expression while updating only the pose, outfit detail, and environment. The scene feels realistic and professional, with soft white lighting and minimal dental elements for an authentic checkup vibe.

prompts.name: 专业徽章照片，随时可用
prompts.content:
根据上传的图像创建人员的现代企业身份证照片，适合公司徽章和内部系统。
保持脸部与上传图片一致，比例真实，无美化或年龄调整。

取景：
• 头部和肩部处于中立、居中的位置
• 拍摄对象直视相机，表情中立但友好

背景：
• [BACKGROUND_COLOR] 中纯、均匀的背景，无纹理、无渐变
• 没有道具、没有文字、没有标志

风格：
• 光线均匀、柔和，阴影最小化
• 面部周围高清晰度和清晰度、自然肤色、高分辨率

服装：
• 将服装转变为与公司环境相匹配的[OUTFIT_STYLE]
• 没有可见的徽标、图案或分散注意力的配件

使结果看起来像企业 ID 或访问徽章照片的升级版、光线充足的专业版本，随时可以放入内部工具、电子邮件帐户或通行证中。
prompts.description: 创建干净、高分辨率的徽章照片，具有柔和均匀的灯光、朴素的纯色背景和公司服装，为内部工具和配置文件做好准备。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.nameEn: Professional Badge Photo, Ready to Use
prompts.contentEn:
Create a modern corporate ID photo of the person from the uploaded image, suitable for company badges and internal systems.
Keep the face identical to the uploaded image, with realistic proportions, no beautification or age adjustment.

Framing:
• Neutral, centered head and shoulders
• Subject looking straight at the camera with a neutral but friendly expression

Background:
• Plain, uniform background in [BACKGROUND_COLOR], no texture, no gradient
• No props, no text, no logos

Style:
• Even, soft lighting with minimal shadows
• High clarity and sharpness around the face, natural skin tones, high-resolution

Outfit:
• Transform clothing into [OUTFIT_STYLE] that matches a corporate environment
• No visible logos, patterns or distracting accessories

Make the result look like an upgraded, well-lit, professional version of a corporate ID or access badge photo, ready to be dropped into internal tools, email accounts or passes.
prompts.descriptionEn: Creates a clean, high-resolution badge photo with soft even lighting, a plain solid background, and a corporate outfit, ready for internal tools and profiles.

prompts.name: 建筑研究表：[HISTORIC_SITE_NAME]
prompts.content: ${historic_site_name} 的复古建筑信息图，融合了艺术和技术清晰度：中心有详细的前立面，后面有 ${location} 的干净线条艺术景观，以及带有“${height_value_1}”和“${height_value_2}”等示例值的注释尺寸线。该作品周围有 2-3 个特写细节框和一个“场地规划 – ${location}”面板，在温暖的老化纸张上使用钢笔和墨水绘制阴影，感觉就像一张手绘的建筑学习表。
prompts.description: [HISTORIC_SITE_NAME] 的复古建筑信息图，融合了艺术和技术清晰度：中心有详细的前立面，后面是 [LOCATION] 的干净线条艺术景观，以及带有“[HEIGHT_VALUE_1]”和“[HEIGHT_VALUE_2]”等示例值的注释尺寸线。该作品周围有 2-3 个特写细节框和一个“场地平面图 - [位置]”面板，在温暖的老化纸上使用钢笔和墨水绘制阴影，感觉就像一张手绘的建筑学习表。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.contentEn: A vintage architectural infographic of ${historic_site_name} that blends art and technical clarity: a detailed front elevation at the center, a clean line-art landscape of ${location} behind it, and annotated dimension lines with sample values like “${height_value_1}” and “${height_value_2}”. Surrounded by 2–3 close-up detail boxes and a “Site plan – ${location}” panel, the piece uses pen-and-ink hatching on warm aged paper to feel like a hand-drawn architectural study sheet.
prompts.descriptionEn: A vintage architectural infographic of [HISTORIC_SITE_NAME] that blends art and technical clarity: a detailed front elevation at the center, a clean line-art landscape of [LOCATION] behind it, and annotated dimension lines with sample values like “[HEIGHT_VALUE_1]” and “[HEIGHT_VALUE_2]”. Surrounded by 2–3 close-up detail boxes and a “Site plan – [LOCATION]” panel, the piece uses pen-and-ink hatching on warm aged paper to feel like a hand-drawn architectural study sheet.

prompts.name: 粘土制作的城市：迷你[城市名称]世界
prompts.content:
生成一个异想天开的微型世界，其中 ${landmark_name} 完全由彩色粘土制作而成。每个元素（建筑物、树木、水道和城市特征）都应该是手工雕刻的，具有明显的指纹和有机粘土纹理。使用俏皮、童趣的风格和鲜艳的色彩：明亮的蔚蓝天空、蓬松的奶油色云彩、翠绿的树木以及暖黄色、橙色、红色和蓝色的建筑。每个表面和柔和的曲线都应该体现出手工制作的品质。从广阔的视角捕捉，以和谐、欢乐的构图展示整个微缩景观。

在顶部中心，以干净、粗体、友好的圆形字体添加城市名称 ${city_name}，与俏皮的粘土美学相匹配。文本应该清晰易读，与天空形成高对比度，具有微妙的深度，就好像它也是由粘土制成的（轻微的 3D 粘土字体），但保持简单，不要过于详细。

场景中其他任何地方均不得包含其他文字、文字或标牌。只有雕塑粘土元素才能通过可识别的建筑特征来定义位置。 1080x1080 尺寸。
prompts.description: [城市名称] 的欢乐微型世界完全由[地标名称] 周围的彩色粘土模型建造而成。可见的指纹、有机的曲线和充满活力的俏皮色彩营造出童趣十足的手工外观。城市名称出现在顶部，场景中没有其他文字或标牌。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.nameEn: A Clay-Crafted City: Mini [CITY NAME] World
prompts.contentEn:
Generate a whimsical miniature world featuring ${landmark_name} crafted entirely from colorful modeling clay. Every element (buildings, trees, waterways, and urban features) should appear hand-sculpted with visible fingerprints and organic clay textures. Use a playful, childlike style with vibrant colors: bright azure sky, puffy cream clouds, emerald trees, and buildings in warm yellows, oranges, reds, and blues. The handmade quality should be evident in every surface and gentle curve. Capture from a wide perspective showcasing the entire miniature landscape in a harmonious, joyful composition.

At the top-center, add the city name ${city_name} in a clean, bold, friendly rounded font that matches the playful clay aesthetic. The text should be clearly readable and high-contrast against the sky, with subtle depth as if it is also made from clay (slight 3D clay lettering), but keep it simple and not overly detailed.

Include no other text, words, or signage anywhere else in the scene. Only sculptural clay elements should define the location through recognizable architectural features. 1080x1080 dimension.
prompts.descriptionEn: A joyful miniature world of [CITY NAME] built entirely from colorful modeling clay around [LANDMARK NAME]. Visible fingerprints, organic curves, and vibrant playful colors create a childlike handmade look. The city name appears at the top, with no other text or signage anywhere in the scene.

prompts.name: 时间层摄影
prompts.content: ${location:Galata Tower, Istanbul} 的单张照片，画面被分为有机、流动的部分，每个部分都显示不同的时代：${era1:1890 年代棕褐色奥斯曼帝国时期}、${era2:1960 年代褪色}、${era3:当今的数字清晰度}。时代之间的过渡是无缝的，通过建筑细节、人们的服装和车辆融为一体。相同的拍摄角度，相同的视角，不同的时间相互渗透。街道层视图。逼真再现每个时代真实的摄影风格。
prompts.description: 在单个图像中叠加同一位置的不同时区。不是早上/中午/晚上，而是相隔数年或几个世纪。
prompts.author: Abdullah Bozdağ
prompts.contentEn: A single photograph of ${location:Galata Tower, Istanbul} where the frame is divided into organic, flowing sections, each showing a different era: ${era1:1890s sepia Ottoman period}, ${era2:1960s faded color}, ${era3:present day digital clarity}. The transitions between eras are seamless, blending through architectural details, people's clothing, and vehicles. Same camera angle, same perspective, different times bleeding into each other. Street level view. Photorealistic for each era's authentic photography style.
prompts.descriptionEn: Overlaying different time zones of the same location in a single image. Not morning/noon/night, but years or centuries apart.

prompts.name: 双重曝光人像
prompts.content: ${name:sunny Forest} 中的双重曝光肖像。显示人物头部和肩膀的左侧轮廓轮廓。剪影的内部完全充满了森林风光，具有丰富的深度。在这个场景的深处，在自然元素之中，同一个人再次以全身的形象出现在环境中。外部背景是明亮的、曝光过度的白光。光线巧妙地从轮廓边缘向内渗透，营造出引人注目的光芒和高对比度效果。高分辨率、影院级、柔和的光线、逼真的纹理、清晰的细节。
prompts.description: 电影双曝光肖像。左侧轮廓充满场景深度；里面有一个微妙的全身人物。明亮的白色背景向内渗透，产生戏剧性的光芒和高对比度。分辨率高，光线柔和，质感逼真，细节清晰。
prompts.author: Abdullah Bozdağ
prompts.contentEn: A double exposure portrait set in a ${name:sunny forest}. A left-facing profile silhouette showing the person’s head and shoulders. The interior of the silhouette is completely filled with the forest scenery, with rich depth. Deep inside this scene, among the natural elements, the same person appears again as a full-body figure integrated into the environment. The outer background is a bright, overexposed white light. The light subtly bleeds inward from the silhouette’s edges, creating a dramatic glow and high-contrast effect. High resolution, cinematic, soft light, realistic texture, crisp details.
prompts.descriptionEn: Cinematic double exposure portrait. Left-facing silhouette filled with scene depth; a subtle full-body figure inside. Bright white background bleeding inward for dramatic glow and high contrast. High resolution, soft light, realistic texture, crisp details.

prompts.name: 传说中的纳米香蕉爆炸视图提示
prompts.author: Ali Aydınlı
prompts.nameEn: Legebdary Exploded View Prompt For nanobanana

prompts.name: 都市休闲自信
prompts.content: 在黄金时段的光线下，${gender:man} 穿着定制休闲装（深色牛仔裤、优质毛衣）${position:靠着风化的砖墙}的超现实肖像。保持原有的面部结构和特征。创造自然的皮肤纹理，细致的毛孔和逼真的胡茬。柔和的自然侧光，自然突出面部轮廓。街头摄影风格，轻微的颗粒感，真实而不失姿态的感觉。
prompts.author: Dogu
prompts.contentEn: Hyper-realistic portrait of a ${gender:man} in tailored casual wear (dark jeans, quality sweater) ${position:leaning against weathered brick wall} in golden hour light. Maintain original face structure and features. Create natural skin texture with subtle pores and realistic stubble. Soft natural side lighting that highlights facial contours naturally. Street photography style, slight grain, authentic and unposed feel.

prompts.name: 逼真的食物图像生成器
prompts.content:
${FOOD_NAME:炸鸡柳配炸薯条} 的超写实美食摄影风格图像，以干净、开胃且专业的构图呈现，适合餐厅菜单、宣传材料、数字屏幕和配送平台。

这道菜以最容易识别和最理想的上菜形式呈现，具有精确的比例和高度逼真的细节——自然的纹理、酥脆的表面、潮湿的内部、可见的蒸汽、光滑但天然的酱汁和新鲜的食材。

灯光柔和、可控、自然，灵感来自专业工作室美食摄影，具有平衡的高光、逼真的阴影和逼真的色彩，增强新鲜感而不夸张。

食物被装在简单、优雅的盘子或碗上，风格简约，以将注意力集中在菜肴上。背景干净且不引人注目（中性表面、深色哑光背景或柔和模糊的设置），以确保强烈的对比度和清晰度。

采用高端数码单反相机拍摄的外观 — 浅景深、对食物的清晰聚焦、自然的镜头视角和高分辨率。没有插图，没有程式化，没有人为效果。

商业级真实感、美味、值得信赖，适合真正的餐厅使用。

--ar 4:5
prompts.description: 该提示会生成专为真实餐厅使用而设计的超逼真食品图像，包括菜单、配送平台和宣传材料。它遵循专业的食品摄影标准，具有自然采光、逼真的纹理和干净的镀层。只需提供食物名称，即可轻松在完整菜单中重复使用，同时保持一致、值得信赖的视觉效果。
prompts.author: Eren Özkul
prompts.contentEn:
Ultra-realistic food photography–style image of ${FOOD_NAME:Fried chicken tenders with french fries}, presented in a clean, appetizing, and professional composition suitable for restaurant menus, promotional materials, digital screens, and delivery platforms.

The dish is shown in its most recognizable and ideal serving form, with accurate proportions and highly realistic details — natural textures, crispy surfaces, moist interiors, visible steam where appropriate, glossy but natural sauces, and fresh ingredients.

Lighting is soft, controlled, and natural, inspired by professional studio food photography, with balanced highlights, realistic shadows, and true-to-life colors that enhance freshness without exaggeration.

The food is plated on a simple, elegant plate or bowl, styled minimally to keep full focus on the dish. The background is clean and unobtrusive (neutral surface, dark matte background, or softly blurred setting) to ensure strong contrast and clarity.

Captured with a high-end DSLR look — shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the food, natural lens perspective, and high resolution. No illustration, no stylization, no artificial effects.

Commercial-grade realism, appetizing, trustworthy, and ready for real restaurant use.

--ar 4:5
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt generates ultra-realistic food images designed for real restaurant use, including menus, delivery platforms, and promotional materials. It follows professional food photography standards with natural lighting, realistic textures, and clean plating. Only the food name is required, making it easy to reuse across full menus while maintaining consistent, trustworthy visuals.

prompts.name: 与您最喜欢的足球运动员一起在球场边的隧道时刻
prompts.content:
输入

参考1：用户上传的照片

参考资料2：${足球运动员姓名}

球衣号码：${球衣号码}
球衣球队名称：${球衣球队名称}（持有球衣的球队）
用户服装：${用户服装描述}
心情：${心情}

提示
根据用户上传的照片创建一个人物的逼真图像，该人物站在体育场看台前的 ${Footballer Name} 球场边摆姿势拍照。

地点：大型体育场的球场边/边线。天然草坪和广告牌看起来很逼真。

看台：背景看台必须 100% 感觉像 ${Footballer Name} 的球队主场人群（单队氛围）。球队的主导颜色、围巾、旗帜和横幅。没有可见的对手球队颜色或混合部分。

构图：两个主题都集中，并肩。 ${Footballer Name} 可以用一只手臂搂住用户。

道具：他们一起拿着一件球衣对着镜头。球衣背面必须清楚地显示${Footballer Name}和号码${Jersey Number}。打印对齐清晰、锐利且真实。

关键规则（将持有的球衣锁定特定球队）

他们持有的球衣必须是${Jersey Team Name} 的官方球衣设计。

保持球衣颜色、图案和整体设计与${Jersey Team Name}一致。

如果套件通常包含徽章和赞助商，请将它们自然且真实地放置（不要扭曲的徽标或随机文本）。

防止颜色漂移：球衣的主要颜色和次要颜色必须与 ${Jersey Team Name} 的已知颜色保持一致。

注意：${Jersey Team Name} 不得是 ${Footballer Name} 目前效力的俱乐部。

服装：

${Footballer Name}：穿着他当前球队的比赛装备（衬衫、短裤、袜子），看起来自然而准确。

用户：${用户服装描述}

相机：视平线，35mm，微广角，自然景深。焦点集中在两个人身上，背景略显模糊。

照明：体育场照明+日光（或晚间比赛灯）、逼真的阴影、自然的肤色。

面孔：保持用户的面孔和身份与上传的参考一致。 ${Footballer Name} 清晰可辨。表达：${心情}

质量：超逼真，自然的皮肤纹理和织物纹理，高分辨率。

负面提示
所持有的球衣上的球队颜色错误、随机或损坏的徽标/文本、不可读的姓名/号码、多余的肢体/手指、面部扭曲、水印、严重模糊、重复的人群面孔、过度锐化。

输出
单幅图像，3:2 横向或 1:1 方形，高分辨率。
prompts.description: 上传您的照片，输入足球运动员的名字，然后为他们所持有的球衣选择一支球队。该场景是在挤满足球运动员支持者的看台前生成的，而持有的球衣与您所选球队的官方颜色和设计保持一致。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.nameEn: Pitchside Tunnel Moment with Your Favorite Footballer
prompts.contentEn:
Inputs

Reference 1: User’s uploaded photo

Reference 2: ${Footballer Name}

Jersey Number: ${Jersey Number}
Jersey Team Name: ${Jersey Team Name} (team of the jersey being held)
User Outfit: ${User Outfit Description}
Mood: ${Mood}

Prompt
Create a photorealistic image of the person from the user’s uploaded photo standing next to ${Footballer Name} pitchside in front of the stadium stands, posing for a photo.

Location: Pitchside/touchline in a large stadium. Natural grass and advertising boards look realistic.

Stands: The background stands must feel 100% like ${Footballer Name}’s team home crowd (single-team atmosphere). Dominant team colors, scarves, flags, and banners. No rival-team colors or mixed sections visible.

Composition: Both subjects centered, shoulder to shoulder. ${Footballer Name} can place one arm around the user.

Prop: They are holding a jersey together toward the camera. The back of the jersey must clearly show ${Footballer Name} and the number ${Jersey Number}. Print alignment is clean, sharp, and realistic.

Critical rule (lock the held jersey to a specific team)

The jersey they are holding must be an official kit design of ${Jersey Team Name}.

Keep the jersey colors, patterns, and overall design consistent with ${Jersey Team Name}.

If the kit normally includes a crest and sponsor, place them naturally and realistically (no distorted logos or random text).

Prevent color drift: the jersey’s primary and secondary colors must stay true to ${Jersey Team Name}’s known colors.

Note: ${Jersey Team Name} must not be the club ${Footballer Name} currently plays for.

Clothing:

${Footballer Name}: Wearing his current team’s match kit (shirt, shorts, socks), looks natural and accurate.

User: ${User Outfit Description}

Camera: Eye level, 35mm, slight wide angle, natural depth of field. Focus on the two people, background slightly blurred.

Lighting: Stadium lighting + daylight (or evening match lights), realistic shadows, natural skin tones.

Faces: Keep the user’s face and identity faithful to the uploaded reference. ${Footballer Name} is clearly recognizable. Expression: ${Mood}

Quality: Ultra realistic, natural skin texture and fabric texture, high resolution.

Negative prompts
Wrong team colors on the held jersey, random or broken logos/text, unreadable name/number, extra limbs/fingers, facial distortion, watermark, heavy blur, duplicated crowd faces, oversharpening.

Output
Single image, 3:2 landscape or 1:1 square, high resolution.
prompts.descriptionEn: Upload your photo, type the footballer’s name, and choose a team for the jersey they hold. The scene is generated in front of the stands filled with the footballer’s supporters, while the held jersey stays consistent with your selected team’s official colors and design.

prompts.name: 导演变化网格：一张剧照，八张导演重拍作品
prompts.content:
创建单个 3x3 网格图像（正方形、2048x2048、高细节）。
中心图块（第 2 行，第 2 列）必须是准确上传的参考影片，保持不变。请勿以任何方式重新解释、重新绘制、重新照明、重新着色、裁剪、重新构建、风格化、锐化、模糊或转换它。它必须与所提供的完全一致。

导演检测规则
如果上传电影的导演仍然是下面列出的 8 位导演之一，则同一导演的图块必须与原始中心图块完全相同，完全没有任何更改（相同的图像内容、相同的框架、相同的颜色、相同的灯光、相同的纹理）。仅粘贴标签。
所有其他瓷砖都遵循正常的重拍规则。

网格规则
9 个相等的瓷砖采用干净的 3x3 布局，瓷砖之间的排水沟细而均匀。
每个图块的左上角都有一个简单易读的标签，字体和大小一致，对比度高，无变形。
中心瓷砖标签：原装
其他瓷砖标签完全一样：
阿尔弗雷德·希区柯克
黑泽明
费德里科·费里尼
安德烈·塔可夫斯基
英格玛·伯格曼
让-吕克·戈达尔
阿涅斯·瓦尔达
塞尔吉奥·莱昂内
没有其他文本、徽标、字幕或水印。
保持 3x3 对齐完全笔直且干净。

身份+性别锁定（适用于所有非原始图块）
- 使用原始中心图块作为每个人身份的唯一事实来源。
- 保留确切的人数及其角色/职位（不交换谁是谁）。
- 请勿改变任何人的性别或性别表现。没有性别互换，没有性别改变，没有交叉演员。
- 保持每个人的关键身份特征一致：面部结构、发型长度/类型、面部毛发（不得出现/消失）、化妆水平（不得出现/消失）、身体比例、年龄范围、肤色和独特特征（痣/疤痕/眼镜）。
- 不要把一个人变成另一个人。不要合并面。不要把一个人分成两个人。不要在不同的人身上重复同一张脸。
- 如果任何身份属性不明确，则默认与原始属性完全匹配。
- 允许的更改仅限于每个导演的电影处理：取景、镜头感觉、摄像机高度、景深、灯光、调色板、对比度曲线、纹理、情绪和设置重点。身份必须保持锁定状态。
负面：性别互换、女性化/男性化、添加/删除胡须、添加/删除口红、大幅改变头发长度、面部替换、身份漂移。

铸造锚固
- 人 A = 原件中最左边的人，人 B = 原件中最右边的人，人 C = 原件中中间/后面的人，等等。
- 每个图块必须将 A/B/C 保持为相同的个体（相同的性别表现和身份），仅以电影方式重新拍摄。

内容规则（针对非重复图块）
在所有图块（谁/哪里/什么）之间保持可识别的连续性。不要将身份更改为不同的人。
每个导演都有所不同：取景、镜头感觉、摄像机高度、景深、灯光、调色板、对比度曲线、纹理、制作设计重点、情绪。
超清晰的电影剧照（除非指定了漫射）、连贯的灯光、正确的解剖结构、没有重复的面孔、没有破损的手、没有破碎的透视、没有故障伪影以及完全可读的标签。

导演特定的风格和颜色分级（强烈适用于每个图块，除非重复规则适用）

阿尔弗雷德·希区柯克
调色板：柔和的中性色、冷灰色、病态的绿色、深黑色、偶尔饱和的红色。
对比度：高对比度，阴影清晰、充满悬念。
质感：经典35mm洁净，气氛紧张。
镜头/景深：35–50mm，深度受控，几何形状精确。
灯光/遮挡：受黑色影响的实用性、硬调、偷窥框架、心理紧张。

黑泽明
调色板：朴实的不饱和棕色/绿色；如果是彩色的话，则采用克制的原色。
对比：大胆的色调分离，强烈的黑色。
质地：坚韧的薄膜颗粒、触觉元素（泥、雨、风）。
镜头/景深：24-50mm，深焦；动态的舞台和强大的几何形状。
照明/氛围：戏剧性的自然光、天气设计（雾、雨痕、背光）。

费德里科·费里尼
调色板：温暖的琥珀色、狂欢节的红色、奶油色的亮点、柔和的色调。
对比度：中等对比度，梦幻般的光芒和柔和的绽放。
质感：柔和的扩散，戏剧性的超现实抛光。
镜头/景深：正常到广角、舞台场景、丰富的背景布景。
灯光：富有表现力、舞台般、异想天开而又忧郁的情绪。

安德烈·塔可夫斯基
调色板：柔和的棕褐色/橄榄色、冷青灰色、低饱和度、风化色调。
对比度：低到中、柔和的高光衰减。
纹理：有机颗粒、雾气、水渍、老化表面。
镜头/景深：50–85mm，沉思式取景，自然景深。
灯光/氛围：窗光、阴沉的感觉、诗意的元素（雾、雨、烟）、安静的强度。

英格玛·伯格曼
调色板：近乎单色克制、冷灰色、苍白肤色、最小的色彩干扰。
对比度：高对比度、雕刻面孔、深阴影。
质地：干净、亲密、注重心理。
镜头/景深：50–85mm，更紧凑的取景，浅到中景深。
灯光：强烈的基调和戏剧性的衰减，情感强烈的肖像。

让-吕克·戈达尔
调色板：大胆的原色（红/蓝/黄）强调中性色，或有意平坦的自然色。
对比度：中等对比度，偶尔有轻微曝光过度的高光。
纹理：原始 16mm/35mm 能量，不完美且充满活力。
镜头/景深：更宽的镜头，自发的偏心构图。
灯光：可用的光感、街道/霓虹灯/实用、纪录片新浪潮即时性。

阿涅斯·瓦尔达
调色板：温暖的自然光、柔和的粉彩、诚实的肤色、微妙的互补色。
对比度：中等、柔和且诱人。
质感：触感真实，细腻的胶片颗粒。
镜头/景深：28–50mm，带背景的环境人像取景。
灯光：自然主义、以人为本、亲密而又开放的氛围。

塞尔吉奥·莱昂内
调色板：晒金、灰橙色、棕褐色、深阴影、偶尔的绿松石天空色调。
对比度：高对比度、刺眼的阳光、强烈的轮廓。
纹理：砂砾灰尘、汗水、皮革、风化表面、明显的纹理。
镜头/景深：极宽（24-35mm）和极特写语言；眼睛/细节的浅景深。
灯光/氛围：强烈的阳光、边缘光、歌剧般的张力、标志性的戏剧性阴影形状。

输出：仅单个最终 3x3 网格图像。
prompts.description:
将您的原始影片锁定在中央图块中，作为原始影片，未经修改，然后通过八位传奇导演的视觉语言重新拍摄完全相同的场景。此 3x3 网格模板强制执行干净的对齐、一致的标签和强大的导演特定电影摄影（取景、镜头感觉、灯光、颜色分级、纹理、情绪）。
它还包括身份+性别锁定，因此多角色场景保持一致，防止角色漂移、脸部互换或跨图块的性别变化。
prompts.author: Semih Kışlar
prompts.nameEn: Director Variation Grid: One Still, Eight Auteur Re-Shoots
prompts.contentEn:
Create a single 3x3 grid image (square, 2048x2048, high detail).
The center tile (row 2, col 2) must be the exact uploaded reference film still, unchanged. Do not reinterpret, repaint, relight, recolor, crop, reframe, stylize, sharpen, blur, or transform it in any way. It must remain exactly as provided.

Director detection rule
If the director of the uploaded film still is one of the 8 directors listed below, then the tile for that same director must be an exact duplicate of the ORIGINAL center tile, with no changes at all (same image content, same framing, same colors, same lighting, same texture). Only apply the label.
All other tiles follow the normal re-shoot rules.

Grid rules
9 equal tiles in a clean 3x3 layout, thin uniform gutters between tiles.
Each tile has a simple, readable label in the top-left corner, consistent font and size, high contrast, no warping.
Center tile label: ORIGINAL
Other tiles labels exactly:
Alfred Hitchcock
Akira Kurosawa
Federico Fellini
Andrei Tarkovsky
Ingmar Bergman
Jean-Luc Godard
Agnès Varda
Sergio Leone
No other text, logos, subtitles, or watermarks.
Keep the 3x3 alignment perfectly straight and clean.

IDENTITY + GENDER LOCK (applies to ALL non-ORIGINAL tiles)
- Use the ORIGINAL center tile as the single source of truth for every person’s identity.
- Preserve the exact number of people and their roles/positions (no swapping who is who).
- Do NOT change any person’s gender or gender presentation. No gender swap, no sex change, no cross-casting.
- Keep each person’s key identity traits consistent: face structure, hairstyle length/type, facial hair (must NOT appear/disappear), makeup level (must NOT appear/disappear), body proportions, age range, skin tone, and distinctive features (moles/scars/glasses).
- Do not turn one person into a different person. Do not merge faces. Do not split one person into two. Do not duplicate the same face across different people.
- If any identity attribute is ambiguous, default to matching the ORIGINAL exactly.
- Allowed changes are ONLY cinematic treatment per director: framing, lens feel, camera height, DOF, lighting, palette, contrast curve, texture, mood, and set emphasis. Identities must remain locked.
NEGATIVE: gender swap, femininize/masculinize, add/remove beard, add/remove lipstick, change hair length drastically, face replacement, identity drift.

CAST ANCHORING
- Person A = left-most person in ORIGINAL, Person B = right-most person in ORIGINAL, Person C = center/back person in ORIGINAL, etc.
- Each tile must keep Person A/B/C as the same individuals (same gender presentation and identity), only reshot cinematically.

Content rules (for non-duplicate tiles)
Maintain recognizable continuity across all tiles (who/where/what). Do not change identities into different people.
Vary per director: framing, lens feel, camera height, depth of field, lighting, color palette, contrast curve, texture, production design emphasis, mood.
Ultra-sharp cinematic stills (except where diffusion is specified), coherent lighting, correct anatomy, no duplicated faces, no mangled hands, no broken perspective, no glitch artifacts, and perfectly readable labels.

Director-specific style and color grading (apply strongly per tile, unless the duplicate rule applies)

Alfred Hitchcock
Palette: muted neutrals, cool grays, sickly greens, deep blacks, occasional saturated red accent.
Contrast: high contrast with crisp, suspenseful shadows.
Texture: classic 35mm cleanliness with tense atmosphere.
Lens/DOF: 35–50mm, controlled depth, precise geometry.
Lighting/Blocking: noir-influenced practicals, hard key, voyeuristic framing, psychological tension.

Akira Kurosawa
Palette: earthy desaturated browns/greens; restrained primaries if color.
Contrast: bold tonal separation, punchy blacks.
Texture: gritty film grain, tactile elements (mud, rain, wind).
Lens/DOF: 24–50mm with deep focus; dynamic staging and strong geometry.
Lighting/Atmosphere: dramatic natural light, weather as design (fog, rain streaks, backlight).

Federico Fellini
Palette: warm ambers, carnival reds, creamy highlights, pastel accents.
Contrast: medium contrast, dreamy glow and gentle bloom.
Texture: soft diffusion, theatrical surreal polish.
Lens/DOF: normal to wide, staged tableaux, rich background set dressing.
Lighting: expressive, stage-like, whimsical yet melancholic mood.

Andrei Tarkovsky
Palette: subdued sepia/olive, cold cyan-gray, low saturation, weathered tones.
Contrast: low-to-medium, soft highlight roll-off.
Texture: organic grain, misty air, water stains, aged surfaces.
Lens/DOF: 50–85mm, contemplative framing, naturalistic DOF.
Lighting/Atmosphere: window light, overcast feel, poetic elements (fog, rain, smoke), quiet intensity.

Ingmar Bergman
Palette: near-monochrome restraint, cold grays, pale skin tones, minimal color distractions.
Contrast: high contrast, sculpted faces, deep shadows.
Texture: clean, intimate, psychologically focused.
Lens/DOF: 50–85mm, tighter framing, shallow-to-medium DOF.
Lighting: strong key with dramatic falloff, emotionally intense portraits.

Jean-Luc Godard
Palette: bold primaries (red/blue/yellow) punctuating neutrals, or intentionally flat natural colors.
Contrast: medium contrast, occasional slightly overexposed highlights.
Texture: raw 16mm/35mm energy, imperfect and alive.
Lens/DOF: wider lenses, spontaneous off-center composition.
Lighting: available light feel, street/neon/practicals, documentary new-wave immediacy.

Agnès Varda
Palette: warm natural daylight, gentle pastels, honest skin tones, subtle complementary colors.
Contrast: medium, soft and inviting.
Texture: tactile lived-in realism, subtle film grain.
Lens/DOF: 28–50mm, environmental portrait framing with context.
Lighting: naturalistic, human-first, intimate but open atmosphere.

Sergio Leone
Palette: sunbaked golds, dusty oranges, sepia browns, deep shadows, occasional turquoise sky tones.
Contrast: high contrast, harsh sun, strong silhouettes.
Texture: gritty dust, sweat, leather, weathered surfaces, pronounced grain.
Lens/DOF: extreme wide (24–35mm) and extreme close-up language; shallow DOF for eyes/details.
Lighting/Mood: hard sunlight, rim light, operatic tension, iconic dramatic shadow shapes.

Output: a single final 3x3 grid image only.
prompts.descriptionEn:
Lock your original film still in the center tile as ORIGINAL, untouched, then re-shoot the exact same scene through the visual language of eight legendary directors. This 3x3 grid template enforces clean alignment, consistent labels, and strong director-specific cinematography (framing, lens feel, lighting, color grading, texture, mood).
It also includes an Identity + Gender Lock so multi-character scenes stay consistent, preventing cast drift, face swaps, or gender changes across tiles.

prompts.name: 复古植物插图生成器
prompts.content: ${subject} 的植物图解，以老式科学期刊的风格进行插图。它强调自然的色调和详细的横截面，并用棕褐色墨水标记手写注释，唤起学术、古董的魅力。
prompts.description: 该提示创建了一个非常详细的、复古风格的植物科学插图，具有模仿 19 世纪植物学期刊美学的解剖横截面和手写笔记。
prompts.author: Yusuf Can TÜRK
prompts.contentEn: A botanical diagram of a ${subject}, illustrated in the style of vintage scientific journals. Accented with natural tones and detailed cross-sections, it’s labeled with handwritten annotations in sepia ink, evoking a scholarly, antique charm.
prompts.descriptionEn: This prompt creates a highly detailed, vintage-style scientific illustration of a plant, featuring anatomical cross-sections and handwritten notes that mimic the aesthetic of 19th-century botanical journals.

prompts.name: 浮城岛 - 照片真实 4K 海报
prompts.content: 设计一个形状像 ${city:denizli} 地图/剪影的“浮动微型岛屿”，在白云上方滑翔。在岛上，无缝融合${city:denizli}最具标志性的地标、建筑结构和自然景观（公园、海滨、山丘）。将拼写为“${city:denizli}”的大型白色 3D 字母集成到岛屿的表面或地理纹理中。通过城市特有的鸟类、电影般的阳光、鲜艳的色彩、空中透视和逼真的阴影/反射渲染来增强氛围。超高清品质、超逼真纹理、4K+ 分辨率、数字海报格式。方形 1×1 构图、照片级真实感、体积照明、全局照明、光线追踪。
prompts.description: 方形 1×1 真实照片海报，浮岛的形状就像白云上方的城市剪影。融合主要地标、建筑和自然景观。电影般的阳光、鲜艳的色彩、空中透视、体积照明、全局照明、光线追踪阴影。超高清。
prompts.author: Abdullah Bozdağ
prompts.contentEn: Design a "floating miniature island" shaped like the ${city:denizli} map/silhouette, gliding above white clouds. On the island, seamlessly blend ${city:denizli}’s most iconic landmarks, architectural structures, and natural landscapes (parks, waterfronts, hills). Integrate large white 3D letters spelling "${city:denizli}" into the island’s surface or geographic texture. Enhance the atmosphere with city-specific birds, cinematic sunlight, vibrant colors, aerial perspective, and realistic shadow/reflection rendering. Ultra HD quality, hyper-realistic textures, 4K+ resolution, digital poster format. Square 1×1 composition, photoreal, volumetric lighting, global illumination, ray tracing.
prompts.descriptionEn: Square 1×1 photoreal poster of a floating island shaped like the city’s silhouette above white clouds. Blend key landmarks, architecture, and natural landscapes. Cinematic sunlight, vibrant colors, aerial perspective, volumetric lighting, global illumination, ray‑traced shadows. Ultra HD.

prompts.name: 建筑草图和标记叠加
prompts.content: 根据源图像，将建筑师繁忙的工作过程叠加到整个场景上。图像应看起来像覆盖原始照片的蓝图或描图纸，充满手写的黑色墨水草图、技术注释、带有测量值的尺寸线（例如“12'-4”、“CLG HGT 9'”）、显示结构细节的粗略横截面图、带有“稍后修改”等注释的修订云，以及指向标有英国建筑师注释（如“检查梁”、“移除完成”）的特定元素的引线，或“拟议的新开张”。风格应该是凌乱的、真实的，并且看起来像一幅正在进行中的概念图。
prompts.description: 将任何图像转换为正在进行的建筑研究。此提示将逼真的手写英文注释、尺寸线、横截面和黑色墨水草图叠加到您的照片上，模拟专业的设计审查、场地分析或改造概念阶段。
prompts.author: Yusuf Can TÜRK
prompts.contentEn: Based on the source image, overlay an architect's busy working process onto the entire scene. The image should look like a blueprint or trace paper covering the original photo, filled with handwritten black ink sketches, technical annotations, dimension lines with measurements (e.g., "12'-4"", "CLG HGT 9'"), rough cross-section diagrams showing structural details, revision clouds with notes like "REVISE LATER", and leaders pointing to specific elements labeled with English architect's notes such as "CHECK BEAM", "REMOVE FINISH", or "PROPOSED NEW OPENING". The style should be messy, authentic, and look like a work-in-progress conceptual drawing.
prompts.descriptionEn: Transforms any image into a work-in-progress architectural study. This prompt overlays realistic handwritten English notes, dimension lines, cross-sections, and black ink sketches onto your photo, simulating a professional design review, site analysis, or renovation concept phase.

prompts.name: 3D 等距微型立体模型
prompts.content:
“当我向您提供电影台词时，切勿回复文字或提示。相反，请分析台词出现的场景，并以“3D 等距微型立体模型、倾斜移位、45 度角”（图像生成）的风格将其可视化。仅提供图像。”

Quote =“你不能通过！”
prompts.description:
此提示指示模型在给出电影台词时，
它绝不能回复文字、解释或新的提示。

相反，它必须：
分析这句话出现的场景，

以 3D 等距微型立体模型的风格可视化该场景，具有倾斜移位和 45 度角，

并且只输出图像，不输出文本。

简而言之，目标是：
将电影场景重新创建为具有移轴微型外观的微型等距立体模型。
prompts.author: furkan kaan akyüz
prompts.contentEn:
"When I give you a movie quote, never reply with text or a prompt. Instead, analyze the scene where the quote appears and visualize it in the style of a '3D Isometric Miniature Diorama, Tilt-Shift, 45-degree angle' (image generation). Provide only the image."

Quote = "You shall not pass!"
prompts.descriptionEn:
This prompt instructs the model that when given a movie quote,
it must never reply with text, explanation, or a new prompt.

Instead, it must:
Analyze the scene in which the quote appears,

Visualize that scene in the style of a 3D Isometric Miniature Diorama, with tilt-shift and a 45-degree angle,

And output only the image, with no text.

In short, the goal is to:
Recreate the movie scene as a tiny isometric diorama with a tilt-shift, miniature look.

prompts.name: 世界地标：超现实 3D 立体模型
prompts.content: 创建 ${Landmark Name:EIFFEL TOWER} 的超现实 3D 立体模型。该模型应显示为微缩模型，设置在地球的凸起横截面上，显示茂密的草地表面下的土壤和岩石层。该结构必须非常详细且比例准确，周围环绕着微小的现实元素，例如适合该地区的路灯、本土树木、灌木、小喷泉等水景以及历史或文化契合的道路。该场景应唤起${地标名称：艾菲尔铁塔}周围景观的独特特征。环境必须包括柔和的白色背景，以引起模型的全部注意力。包括文字“${地标名称：艾菲尔铁塔}”，采用大号、粗体、优雅的字体，突出显示在立体模型前面的大标志或广告牌上，易于阅读和引人注目，同时在 ${地标名称：艾菲尔铁塔} 旁边的高大、显眼的旗杆上悬挂一面大国旗，清晰可见并飘扬。 1080x1080 尺寸
prompts.description: 将世界上最著名的纪念碑重新想象成令人惊叹的桌面微缩模型。此提示会生成复杂的 3D 立体模型，设置在真实的地球横截面上，并配有郁郁葱葱的景观、自定义标牌和旗帜。非常适合旅行概念和等距艺术。
prompts.author: Serkan Ozcan
prompts.contentEn: Create a hyper-realistic 3D diorama-style model of ${Landmark Name:EIFFEL TOWER}. The model should appear as a miniature, set on a raised cross-section of earth that reveals soil and rock layers beneath a lush grassy surface. The structure must be highly detailed and proportionally accurate, surrounded by tiny realistic elements like region-appropriate street lamps, native trees, shrubs, water features like small fountains, and historically or culturally fitting pathways. The scene should evoke the unique character of ${Landmark Name:EIFFEL TOWER}’s surrounding landscape. The environment must include a soft white background to draw full attention to the model. Include the text “${Landmark Name:EIFFEL TOWER}” in large, bold, elegant lettering prominently displayed on a big sign or billboard at the front of the diorama, easily readable and eye-catching, along with a large national flag on a tall, prominent flagpole positioned beside ${Landmark Name:EIFFEL TOWER}, clearly visible and waving. 1080x1080 dimension
prompts.descriptionEn: Reimagine the world's most famous monuments as stunning tabletop miniatures. This prompt generates intricate 3D dioramas set on realistic earth cross-sections, complete with lush landscaping, custom signage, and flags. Perfect for travel concepts and isometric art.

prompts.name: 异想天开的 3D 品牌微缩模型
prompts.content:
${品牌名称：麦当劳}的3D赤壁风格微型概念店，创意设计的外观灵感来自于该品牌最具标志性的产品或包装（如​​巨型${品牌核心产品：鸡桶、汉堡、甜甜圈、烤鸭}）。店内共有两层，大玻璃窗清晰地展现出舒适而精致的店内装潢：{品牌主色}主题的装潢，温暖的灯光，忙碌的工作人员穿着与品牌相配的服装。可爱的小人物沿着街道漫步或坐着，周围是长凳、路灯和盆栽，营造出迷人的城市景观。使用 Cinema 4D 以微缩城市景观风格渲染，具有盲盒玩具的美感，细节丰富且真实，沐浴在柔和的灯光下，营造出轻松的午后氛围。 --ar 2:3

品牌名称：${品牌名称：麦当劳}
prompts.description: 将知名品牌改造成可爱的 3D 赤壁风格概念店。该提示将标志性产品设计与微型建筑融为一体，创造出舒适的“盲盒”玩具美学，非常适合有趣的可视化。
prompts.author: Serkan Ozcan
prompts.contentEn:
3D chibi-style miniature concept store of ${Brand Name:Mc Donalds}, creatively designed with an exterior inspired by the brand's most iconic product or packaging (such as a giant ${Brand's core product:chicken bucket, hamburger, donut, roast duck}). The store features two floors with large glass windows clearly showcasing the cozy and finely decorated interior: {brand's primary color}-themed decor, warm lighting, and busy staff dressed in outfits matching the brand. Adorable tiny figures stroll or sit along the street, surrounded by benches, street lamps, and potted plants, creating a charming urban scene. Rendered in a miniature cityscape style using Cinema 4D, with a blind-box toy aesthetic, rich in details and realism, and bathed in soft lighting that evokes a relaxing afternoon atmosphere. --ar 2:3

Brand name: ${Brand Name:Mc Donalds}
prompts.descriptionEn: Transform famous brands into adorable, 3D chibi-style concept stores. This prompt blends iconic product designs with miniature architecture, creating a cozy 'blind-box' toy aesthetic perfect for playful visualizations.

prompts.name: 等距 3D 天气城市景观（PBR 纹理）
prompts.content:
呈现 ${city_name:伊斯坦布尔} 清晰的 45° 自上而下等距微型 3D 卡通场景，展示其最具标志性的地标和建筑元素。使用柔和、精致的纹理、逼真的 PBR 材质以及柔和、逼真的灯光和阴影。将当前的天气状况直接融入城市环境中，营造出身临其境的氛围。
使用干净、简约的构图和柔和的纯色背景。

在顶部中心，以大号粗体文本放置标题“伊斯坦布尔”，其下方有一个突出的天气图标，然后是日期（小号文本）和温度（中号文本）。
所有文本必须以一致的间距居中，并且可以巧妙地与建筑物的顶部重叠。
正方形 1080x1080 尺寸。
prompts.description: 创建具有集成天气元素的令人惊叹的 45° 等距微型城市。该提示将风格化的 3D 卡通美学与逼真的 PBR 材质和柔和的灯光融为一体。具有简洁的布局，包含标题、天气图标、日期和温度，非常适合每日天气更新、UI 设计概念或社交媒体帖子。只需替换城市名称即可生成！
prompts.author: Serkan Ozcan
prompts.contentEn:
Present a clear, 45° top-down isometric miniature 3D cartoon scene of ${city_name:İSTANBUL}, featuring its most iconic landmarks and architectural elements. Use soft, refined textures with realistic PBR materials and gentle, lifelike lighting and shadows. Integrate the current weather conditions directly into the city environment to create an immersive atmospheric mood.
Use a clean, minimalistic composition with a soft, solid-colored background.

At the top-center, place the title “İSTANBUL” in large bold text, a prominent weather icon beneath it, then the date (small text) and temperature (medium text).
All text must be centered with consistent spacing, and may subtly overlap the tops of the buildings.
Square 1080x1080 dimension.
prompts.descriptionEn: Create stunning 45° isometric miniature cities with integrated weather elements. This prompt blends stylized 3D cartoon aesthetics with realistic PBR materials and soft lighting. Features a clean layout with a title, weather icon, date, and temperature, making it perfect for daily weather updates, UI design concepts, or social media posts. Just replace the city name to generate!

prompts.name: 无声的对峙
prompts.content: 高角度自上而下的视图，灯光昏暗的废弃庭院，开裂的混凝土地面，散落的旧标记和褪色的撞击凹痕，长长的怪异人物阴影投射在框架外，没有描绘暴力，深色青色调色板带有强烈的金色光束，粗轮廓，2D动画卡通外观，平坦的阴影，极端的对比度，大气张力。
prompts.description: 自上而下的二维卡通视图，显示一个破裂的废弃庭院。
prompts.author: Fatih Kadir Akın
prompts.contentEn: High-angle top-down view of a dimly lit abandoned courtyard, cracked concrete ground, scattered old markings and faded impact dents, long eerie character shadows cast off-frame, no violence depicted, dark Teal palette with a strong golden beam, thick outlines, 2D animated cartoon look, flat shading, extreme contrast, atmospheric tension.
prompts.descriptionEn: Top-down 2D cartoon view of a cracked, abandoned courtyard.
